title: White House defends Argentina team over Falklands banner
english: The White House has defended the Argentinian football team's decision to display a banner claiming the Falkland Islands, citing freedom of speech principles. While the UK government has called for a FIFA investigation into the political act, American officials argue the players were simply exercising their right to express themselves. The islands remain a point of significant tension, as they are a British territory that Argentina continues to claim.
amharic: የአርጀንቲና እግር ኳስ ቡድን የፎክላንድ ደሴቶችን የይገባኛል ጥያቄ የሚያንጸባርቅ ባነር በማውለብለቡ ምክንያት የተነሳውን ውዝግብ የኋይት ሀውስ በሀሳብ መግለጽ ነፃነት ስም ተከላክሎታል። የብሪታንያ መንግሥት በድርጊቱ ላይ የፊፋ ምርመራ እንዲደረግ ቢጠይቅም፣ የአሜሪካ ባለስልጣናት ተጫዋቾቹ የመናገር መብታቸውን እየተጠቀሙ ነው ሲሉ ይከራከራሉ። ደሴቶቹ በብሪታንያ ቁጥጥር ስር ቢሆኑም አርጀንቲና የራሷ እንደሆነች በመግለጿ በሁለቱ ሀገራት መካከል አለመግባባት ፈጥሯል።
oromo: Garee kubbaa miillaa Arjentiinaa biyyi isaanii qe'ee Falklaand irratti mirga akka qabdu ibsuudhaan alaabaa baasuu isaanii Mootummaan Amerikaa mirga yaada ibsachuu jechuun deggerera. Mootummaan Biriiteen dhimmichi FIFA-n akka qoratamu gaafatus, hoggantoonni Amerikaa garuu gochi kun mirga namoota dhuunfaa ta'uu ibsaniiru. Falklaand erga Biriiteen to'atamtee bubbultees, Arjentiinaan qe'een kun kan koo dha jechuun falmuun ishee wal dhabdee kana daran hammaachiseera.

title: Iraq signs deals with Western oil firms, including to revive Syria pipeline
english: Iraq has finalized major agreements with Western energy companies, including a project to reopen a key oil pipeline connecting Kirkuk to the Syrian coast. By restoring this route with the help of the US firm Chevron, Iraq intends to reduce its reliance on the Strait of Hormuz for oil exports. These deals are part of a broader series of investments worth over $60 billion aimed at strengthening Iraq's economy in sectors like energy, technology, and health.
amharic: ኢራቅ ከምዕራባውያን የነዳጅ ኩባንያዎች ጋር በርካታ ስምምነቶችን የተፈራረመች ሲሆን ከነዚህም መካከል ከኪርኩክ ወደ ሶሪያ የባህር ዳርቻ የሚዘረጋውን የነዳጅ መስመር መልሶ ለመገንባት የሚያስችል ፕሮጀክት ይገኝበታል። ኢራቅ ይህንን መስመር በሼቭሮን ኩባንያ አማካኝነት በማደስ ለነዳጅ ውጤቶቿ መተላለፊያነት የሆርሙዝ ስትሬትን የመጠቀም ጥገኝነቷን ለመቀነስ አቅዳለች። እነዚህ ስምምነቶች በኢነርጂ፣ በቴክኖሎጂ እና በጤና ዘርፎች ላይ ያተኮሩ ሲሆን አጠቃላይ ዋጋቸው ከ60 ቢሊዮን ዶላር በላይ እንደሚደርስ ተገልጿል።
oromo: Iraaq dhaabbilee fayyadamtoota boba'aa dhiha waliin waligaltee bal'aa kan mallatteessite yoo ta'u, isaan keessaa isa ijoon karaa boba'aa Kirkuk irraa gara qarqara galaana Suuriyaatti geessu deebisanii ijaaruudha. Iraaq karaa kana dhaabbata Chevron waliin ta'uun deebisanii fayyadamuudhaan, boba'aa ishee gabaatti baasuuf dirreedha Hormuz irratti hirkattummaa qabdu hir'isuu barbaaddi. Waligalteen kun dameewwan anniisaa, teeknooloojii fi fayyaa irratti kan xiyyeeffatu ta'ee, gatiin isaa waligalaan dolaara biiliyoona 60 ol kan tilmaamamuudha.

title: US launches seventh straight night of strikes on Iran
english: For the seventh night in a row, the United States has conducted military strikes across various Iranian provinces, aiming to weaken the country's defense capabilities. Tehran has condemned these actions, accusing the U.S. of damaging civilian infrastructure and threatening to launch a full-scale offensive if the attacks persist. As both sides exchange fire, there is rising international concern that the escalating conflict could trigger a broader regional crisis.
amharic: አሜሪካ የኢራንን ወታደራዊ አቅም ለማዳከም ያለመ የአየር ጥቃቷን ለሰባተኛ ተከታታይ ቀን ቀጥላለች። ኢራን በበኩሏ አሜሪካ በሲቪል መሠረተ ልማቶች ላይ ጉዳት እያደረሰች ነው በማለት ከሰሰች እና ጥቃቱ ካልቆመ መጠነ ሰፊ የሆነ አጸፋዊ እርምጃ እንደምትወስድ አስጠንቅቃለች። ሁለቱ ሀገራት እያደረጉት ያለው ይህ ግጭት በአካባቢው ላይ ከፍተኛ ስጋት የፈጠረ ሲሆን ወደ ሙሉ ጦርነት ሊያመራ ይችላል የሚል ስጋትም ተባብሷል።
oromo: Ameerikaan humna waraana Iraan dadhabsiisuuf jecha guyyaa torbaaf walitti aansuun rukuttaa waraanaa geggeessaa jirti. Iraan gama isheetiin, Ameerikaan bu'uraalee misoomaa siivilii irratti miidhaa geessisaa jirti jechuun komattee, qilleensichi yoo itti fufe waraana guutuu ta'e banuuf akka qophoofte akeekkachiisteetti. Gara lamaanuu wal-dha’ichi kun naannichatti soda guddaa uumee waan jiruuf, walitti bu'iinsi kun gara waraana bal'aatti jijjiiramuu danda'a jedhamee sodaatama.

title: Two oil tankers exploded after passing through mined route south of Strait of Hormuz, Iran's state TV reports
english: Two oil tankers were engulfed in flames following explosions near the Strait of Hormuz. Iranian state media, quoting the Revolutionary Guards, indicated the vessels struck mines while navigating the area. This incident raises significant concerns regarding maritime safety in a vital global shipping lane.
amharic: በሆርሙዝ ስትሬት አቅራቢያ ሁለት የነዳጅ መርከቦች ፈንድተው በእሳት ተያያዙ። የኢራን መንግሥት መገናኛ ብዙኃን እንደዘገቡት መርከቦቹ ፈንጂ በያዘ መስመር ላይ በመጓዛቸው ነው አደጋው የደረሰው። ይህ ክስተት በዓለም አቀፍ የባህር ንግድ መስመር ላይ ትልቅ ስጋት ፈጥሯል።
oromo: Doowwii gaara Hormuz biratti uumameen dooniiwwan boba'aa lama ibiddaan gubataniiru. Miidiyaaleen mootummaa Iraan akka gabaasanitti, dooniiwwan kun kan miidhaman karaa mine ykn meeshaa waraanaa bishaan jalaatti awwaalame keessa darbuudhaani. Rakkoon kun daldala galaana addunyaa irratti soda guddaa uumeera.

title: Five blasts heard in Yazd, in center of Iran, report says
english: Early Saturday morning, multiple explosions were reported in the Iranian city of Yazd and several southern provinces. These incidents follow a series of ongoing military strikes conducted by the United States. Iranian state media confirmed the sounds of these blasts occurred as regional tensions continue to escalate.
amharic: ቅዳሜ ጎህ ሲቀድ በኢራን ያዝድ ከተማ እና በበርካታ የደቡብ ግዛቶች የፍንዳታ ድምፆች ተሰምተዋል። እነዚህ ፍንዳታዎች የተከሰቱት አሜሪካ በሀገሪቱ ላይ ተከታታይ የአየር ጥቃቶችን ካደረሰች በኋላ ነው። የኢራን መንግሥት መገናኛ ብዙኃን በክልሉ እየተባባሰ የመጣውን ውጥረት ተከትሎ ፍንዳታዎቹ መከሰታቸውን አረጋግጠዋል።
oromo: Dilbata ganama osoo hin bariin, magaala Yazd fi naannolee kibba Iraan garaa garaa keessatti sagaleen dhohiinsa hedduu dhaga'ameera. Dhohiinsonni kun kanneen dhufan tarkaanfii waraana Ameerikaan biyyattii irratti torban tokkoof fudhachaa jirtu boodadha. Miidiyaaleen mootummaa Iraan akka gabaasanitti, waraanni fi walitti bu'iinsi naannichaa hamachaa dhufuun isaa dhohiinsa kanaaf sababa ta'eera.

title: Trump threatens to tariff Canada over wildfire smoke choking northern US cities
english: Donald Trump has threatened to impose tariffs on Canada, accusing the country of negligence in managing its forests as smoke from hundreds of wildfires spreads across the northern United States. This thick smoke has triggered hazardous air quality alerts in major cities, leading to widespread disruptions and health concerns for many Americans. While some US lawmakers are demanding immediate action from Canada, the ongoing environmental crisis has intensified tensions between the two nations regarding forest management and climate responsibility.
amharic: ዶናልድ ትራምፕ በካናዳ እየተቀጣጠሉ ባሉ የደን ቃጠሎዎች ሳቢያ ወደ አሜሪካ የሚገባው መርዛማ ጭስ ለተፈጠረው ብክለት ካናዳን በመክሰስ የንግድ ቀረጥ እንደምትጣልባት አስፈራሩ። በካናዳ እየተቃጠሉ ያሉት በመቶዎች የሚቆጠሩ የደን ቃጠሎዎች በሰሜናዊ አሜሪካ ከተሞች ላይ ከባድ የአየር ብክለት በመፍጠራቸው የጤና ስጋት ፈጥረዋል። አንዳንድ የአሜሪካ ህግ አውጪዎች ካናዳ ኃላፊነቷን ባለመወጣቷ ተቆጥተው እርምጃ እንዲወሰድ ሲጠይቁ፣ ሁኔታው በሁለቱ አገራት መካከል ያለውን ግንኙነት ውጥረት ውስጥ ከቶታል።
oromo: Donald Trump rakkoo qilleensaafi aara bosona Kanadaa keessatti ka'een miidhaa qaqqabeef Kanadaa irratti gibira dabalataa akka kaa'u akeekkachiiseera. Aaran bosonaa kunneen gara biyyoota Ameerikaa kaabaatti babal'achuun qilleensa magaalonni gurguddoon akka faalamanifi fayyaan ummataa akka miidhamu godheera. Qaamoleen seera baastota Ameerikaa tokko tokko Kanadaan bosona ishee qulqulleessuu irratti laafte jettee komachuun tarkaanfii cimaa akka fudhatamu gaafachaa jiru.

title: Tackling Messi ‘huge challenge’ for Spain in World Cup final: Merino
english: Spanish midfielder Mikel Merino has acknowledged the difficult task of stopping Lionel Messi as Spain prepares to face Argentina in the World Cup final. Merino expressed high confidence in his own performance after scoring crucial late goals for his team during the tournament. He emphasized that the collective success of the squad is more important than individual glory and expects a physically intense game against the defending champions.
amharic: የስፔኑ አማካይ ሚኬል ሜሪኖ በዓለም ዋንጫ ፍጻሜ ከአርጀንቲና ጋር ሲጫወቱ ሊዮኔል ሜሲን መግታት ትልቅ ፈተና እንደሚሆንባቸው ተናግረዋል። ሜሪኖ በውድድሩ ወሳኝ ግቦችን ካስቆጠረ በኋላ በራሱ ብቃት ላይ ከፍተኛ እምነት እንዳለው ገልጿል። ለቡድኑ ድል ከግለሰብ ክብር ይልቅ የጋራ ጥረት እንደሚበልጥ የጠቆመው ተጫዋቹ፣ ከሻምፒዮኖቹ ጋር የሚያደርጉት ፍልሚያ ከፍተኛ ፉክክር እንደሚታይበት ጠብቋል።
oromo: Giddu-galeessi Ispeen Mikel Merino xumura Waancaa Addunyaa irratti Arjentiinaa mormuun Liyaanol Mesii dhaabuun qormaata guddaa akka ta'e dubbateera. Merino tapha kanaan gooliiwwan murteessoo galchuun isaa ofitti amanamummaa guddaa akka kenneef ibseera. Milkaa'inni garee isaa injifannoo nama dhuunfaa irra akka caalu kan ibse taphataan kun, taphni difeendara qabatee jiru kanaa waliin taasifamu cimaa akka ta'u eegera.

title: Herbert leads British Open golf, equals record lowest score at a Major
english: Australian golfer Lucas Herbert holds a two-shot lead at the British Open after an impressive second-round performance. He and Sam Burns both recorded scores of 62, tying the record for the lowest score ever achieved in a men's major championship. Meanwhile, Bryson DeChambeau faced a setback after receiving a two-shot penalty for an infraction involving long grass during his round.
amharic: አውስትራሊያዊው ጎልፍ ተጫዋች ሉካስ ሄርበርት በብሪቲሽ ኦፕን የሁለተኛው ዙር ውድድር አስደናቂ ብቃት በማሳየት በሁለት ነጥብ እየመራ ይገኛል። ሄርበርት እና ሳም በርንስ የ62 ነጥብ በማስመዝገብ በሜጀር የጎልፍ ውድድሮች ታሪክ ዝቅተኛውን ውጤት በማስመዝገብ ክብረ ወሰኑን እኩል አድርገዋል። በሌላ በኩል ብራይሰን ዲቻምቦ በውድድሩ ወቅት ህግ በመተላለፉ የሁለት ነጥብ ቅጣት ተላልፎበታል።
oromo: Taphatoonni goolfii Awustraaliyaa Luukas Herbert dorgommii British Open irratti qabxii baay'ee gaariin dura bu'aa jira. Herbert fi Saam Barnis qabxii 62 fiduun seenaa dorgommii goolfii gurguddaa keessatti qabxii hunda caalaa xiqqaa ta'e galmeessisaniiru. Gamasa biraatiin, Biraayisan Diichaamboon seera dorgommicha cabsachuu isaatiin qabxii lamaan akka hir'ifamu ta'eera.

title: Star speedcubers square off at European championship
english: Over 1,200 participants from 53 nations have gathered in the Netherlands for the European Speedcubing Championship. Top puzzle experts are competing to solve Rubik's Cubes under challenging conditions, including wearing oven mitts or being blindfolded. This event highlights the incredible skill and speed of the world's best cubers.
amharic: ከ53 አገራት የተውጣጡ ከ1,200 በላይ ተወዳዳሪዎች በኔዘርላንድስ በሚካሄደው የአውሮፓ የሩቢክስ ኪዩብ ፈጣን መፍታት ሻምፒዮና ላይ ለመሳተፍ ተሰብስበዋል። አለምአቀፍ የሎጂክ እንቆቅልሽ ባለሙያዎች ኪዩቦችን በዓይነ-ስውርነት ወይም የእጅ ጓንቶችን በመጠቀም ለመፍታት ይፎካከራሉ። ይህ ውድድር የተወዳዳሪዎቹን አስደናቂ ፍጥነት እና ችሎታ የሚያሳይ ነው።
oromo: Hirmaatonni 1,200 ol ta'an biyyoota 53 irraa dhufan, Nezerlaanditti qophii Shaampiyoonaa 'Speedcubing' kan Awurooppaa irratti walgahaniiru. Ogeeyyonni falaasamaa fi hayyuunni 'Rubik’s Cube' kun, cube-wwan gaaddidduu uffatanii ykn harka isaaniitti gaantii (oven mitts) godhatanii saffisaan hiikuuf dorgomaa jiru. Dorgommiin kun dandeettii fi saffisa nama dinqisiisu kan dorgomtootaa agarsiisa.

title: ICE agent behind fatal shooting in Maine reportedly had troubled history
english: David Brouillette, an ICE agent who fatally shot a man in Maine, is facing scrutiny after family members revealed he had a history of violent behavior and mental health struggles. Critics argue that the Trump administration’s rapid expansion of ICE personnel has led to lowered hiring standards and a lack of proper vetting. This incident is part of a growing pattern of violence involving federal immigration agents under the current administration's aggressive enforcement policies.
amharic: በሜይን ግዛት አንድን ሰው በጥይት የገደለው የኢሚግሬሽን መኮንን ዴቪድ ብሩሌት፣ የቀድሞ የኃይል አድራጊነት ታሪክ እና የአእምሮ ጤና ችግር እንደነበረበት ቤተሰቦቹ መግለጻቸው ከፍተኛ ውዝግብ አስነሳ። ተቺዎች የትራምፕ አስተዳደር የኢሚግሬሽን ተቋሙን በፍጥነት ለማስፋፋት ሲል የቅጥር መስፈርቶችን በማላላቱ ለዚህ አሳዛኝ ክስተት መዳረጋቸውን ይከራከራሉ። ይህ አጋጣሚ በአሜሪካ መንግስት ጠንካራ የኢሚግሬሽን እርምጃዎች ወቅት በኤጀንሲው አባላት የሚፈጸሙ የኃይል ድርጊቶች እየጨመሩ መምጣታቸውን የሚያሳይ ነው።
oromo: Ajajoon Godina Maine keessatti nama tokko ajjeese David Brouillette jedhamu, seenaa gocha gara jabinaa fi rakkoo fayyaa sammuu qabaachuu isaatiin maatiin isaa ibsaniiru. Namoonni biyyoolessaa kunneen akka jedhanitti, bulchiinsi Trump hojjettoota ICE ariitiidhaan ramaduuf jechuun seera qacarrii laaffisuun isaa balaa kanaaf akka nama saaxile dubbatu. Kuniis, akkaataa bulchiinsi amma jiru kun duula baqattootaa irratti godhuun walqabatee gochi hammeenyaa ajajoota federaalaa biratti mul'achaa jiru dabaluu isaa agarsiisa.

title: Food emergency deepens across Uganda’s Karamoja
english: The Karamoja region of Uganda is facing a severe food crisis following a prolonged lack of rain that destroyed local harvests. This shortage has led to increasing rates of malnutrition, particularly among children and other vulnerable residents. Local communities are now urgently appealing for humanitarian aid to address the deepening emergency.
amharic: የኡጋንዳው ካራሞጃ ክልል ለወራት በዘለቀው ዝናብ እጦት ምክንያት ሰብሎች በመውደማቸው ከፍተኛ የምግብ እጥረት አጋጥሞታል። ይህም ችግር በተለይም በህጻናት እና በሌሎች ተጋላጭ የህብረተሰብ ክፍሎች ላይ ከፍተኛ የምግብ እጥረት (የተመጣጠነ ምግብ እጦት) እንዲባባስ አድርጓል። የተጎዱት ነዋሪዎች በአስቸኳይ ጊዜ እርዳታ እንዲደረግላቸው ጥሪ እያቀረቡ ይገኛሉ።
oromo: Naannoon Kaaraamoojaa kan Ugaandaa, rooba dhabuu irraa kan ka'e midhaan lafa keessa jiru waan badeef, rakkoo beelaa cimaa keessa jira. Rakkoon kun keessattuu ijoollee fi namoota harka qalleeyyii irratti miidhaa guddaa geessisee jira. Jiraattonni naannichaa gargaarsa ariifachiisaa akka isaan ga'u mootummaa fi qaoleewwan gargaarsa kennan gaafachaa jiru.

title: Iraq and Syria sign deal to rehabilitate Mediterranean pipeline, bypass Strait of Hormuz
english: Iraq and Syria have reached an agreement to restore the Kirkuk-Baniyas oil pipeline. This project, supported by the United States, aims to transport Iraqi crude oil to the Mediterranean Sea. By reopening this route, both nations seek to reduce their dependence on the Strait of Hormuz for oil exports.
amharic: ኢራቅ እና ሶሪያ የኪርኩክ-ባኒያስ የነዳጅ ማስተላለፊያ መስመርን እንደገና ለመገንባት ስምምነት ተፈራርመዋል። በአሜሪካ ድጋፍ የሚከናወነው ይህ ፕሮጀክት የኢራቅን ድፍድፍ ነዳጅ ወደ ሜዲትራኒያን ባህር ለማጓጓዝ ያለመ ነው። መስመሩን መልሶ መክፈት ሁለቱም ሀገራት በሆርሙዝ ስትሬት ላይ ያላቸውን ጥገኝነት ለመቀነስ ይረዳቸዋል።
oromo: Iraaq fi Suuriyaan immoo daandii boombii boba'aa Kirkuk-Baniyas deebisanii ijaaruuf walii galtee mallatteessaniiru. Sagantaan kun kan gargaarsa Ameerikaatiin raawwatamu yoo ta'u, boba'aa Iraaq gara galaana Meeditiraaneeniyaatti erguf gargaara. Daandii kana banuun biyyoonni lamaanuu raayyoolee Hormuz irratti hirkattummaa qaban hir'isuuf isaan gargaara.

title: Centcom says it redirected, disabled vessels during Iran naval blockade
english: The United States Central Command has implemented a new naval blockade targeting ships moving through Iranian ports. Over the first three days, American forces intercepted several commercial vessels, successfully rerouting four of them, disabling one, and boarding another. This operation marks a significant intensification of maritime control efforts in the region.
amharic: የአሜሪካ ማዕከላዊ ዕዝ ወደ ኢራን ወደቦች በሚገቡና በሚወጡ መርከቦች ላይ አዲስ የባህር ላይ እገዳ ጥሏል። በዘመቻው የመጀመሪያዎቹ ሶስት ቀናት ውስጥ የአሜሪካ ኃይሎች አራት የንግድ መርከቦችን አቅጣጫ ያስቀየሩ ሲሆን አንዱን መርከብ ማሰናከልና ሌላውን ደግሞ መቆጣጠር ችለዋል። ይህ እርምጃ በአካባቢው ያለውን የባህር ላይ ቁጥጥር ጥብቅ ማድረጉን ያሳያል።
oromo: Ajajni giddugaleessa US gara buufataalee Iraanitti seenanii fi bahani irratti to’annoo galaanaa haaraa taasiseera. Guyyoota sadii darban keessatti, waraanni US dooniiwwan daldalaa afur karaa irraa akka maqan gochuun, tokko akka dhaabbatu taasiseera, akkasumas doonii biraa tokko irratti ol bahuun to’annoo jala oolcheera. Tarkaanfiin kun naannichatti humna galaanaa irratti dhiibbaa fi to’annoo guddaa dabaleera.

title: Trump’s 'Board of Peace' abandons Gaza ‘recovery plan’: Report
english: President Trump's 'Board of Peace' has scaled back its Gaza recovery strategy, shifting from large-scale reconstruction to a plan involving temporary portable housing near the Rafah border. The proposed peacekeeping force, which includes troops from various nations, still lacks a clear legal agreement and sufficient funding to begin operations. Ongoing uncertainty regarding the Israeli political landscape and a lack of financial support further complicate these limited stabilization efforts.
amharic: የፕሬዚዳንት ትራምፕ 'የሰላም ቦርድ' የጋዛን መልሶ ግንባታ እቅድ ከትልቅ የመሰረተ ልማት ስራ ወደ ጊዜያዊ ተንቀሳቃሽ ቤቶች ግንባታ ዝቅ አድርጎታል። በፕሮጀክቱ ውስጥ የሚሳተፈው አለም አቀፍ የሰላም አስከባሪ ሃይል እስካሁን ህጋዊ ማዕቀፍ እና በቂ የገንዘብ ድጋፍ አላገኘም። በእስራኤል የፖለቲካ ሁኔታ ላይ ያለው እርግጠኛ አለመሆን እና የገንዘብ እጥረት እቅዱን ተግባራዊ ለማድረግ ፈታኝ ሁኔታዎችን ፈጥረዋል።
oromo: Boordiin Nageenyaa kan Prezidaant Traamp karoora Gaza deebisanii ijaaruu, ijaarsa gurguddaa irraa gara mana yeroo fi qilleensaatti geeddaree jira. Humnootni nageenya kabachiisuu biyyoota addaddaarraa dhufan kun, hanga ammaatti seeraa fi maallaqa gahaa waan hin arganneef hojii eegaluu hin dandeenye. Haalli siyaasaa Israa'el fi rakkoon bajataa karoora kana raawwachuu irratti gufuu guddaa ta'ee jira.

title: ISNA says US military has attacked area around Sirik in southern Iran
english: The Iranian Students’ News Agency reported that the United States military carried out an attack near the town of Sirik in southern Iran. Details regarding the extent of the damage or potential casualties remain limited at this time. Tensions in the region have been highlighted by this reported military action.
amharic: የኢራን የተማሪዎች የዜና ወኪል (ISNA) የዩናይትድ ስቴትስ ወታደራዊ ኃይሎች በደቡባዊ ኢራን በምትገኘው ሲሪክ ከተማ አቅራቢያ ጥቃት መፈጸማቸውን ዘግቧል። ስለ ጉዳቱ መጠን ወይም ስለደረሰው የሰው ህይወት መጥፋት እስካሁን የተረጋገጠ መረጃ የለም። ይህ ወታደራዊ እንቅስቃሴ በክልሉ ያለውን ውጥረት ከፍ አድርጎታል።
oromo: Garee oduu barattoota Iraan (ISNA) akka gabaasetti, waraanni Yuunaayitid Isteetis kibba Iraanitti magaalaa Sirik jedhamtu biratti haleellaa raawwateera. Odeeffannoon miidhaa qaqqabe ykn lubbuun namootaa darbe ykn hin darbin hanga ammaatti ifa miti. Tarkaanfiin waraanaa kun naannicha keessatti jeequmsa uumuu danda'a jedhamee sodaatameera.

title: US judge rules in favour of Palestinian-American activist after phone seizure
english: A US federal judge ruled that customs officials acted illegally by seizing and searching the phones of Palestinian-American activist Osama Abu Irshaid at a Washington airport. The court found that authorities lacked the necessary reasonable suspicion of criminal activity required to justify these intrusive searches. This decision protects the activist's Fourth Amendment rights against unreasonable government interference.
amharic: የአሜሪካ የፌደራል ፍርድ ቤት በዋሽንግተን አውሮፕላን ማረፊያ የፍልስጤም-አሜሪካዊው አክቲቪስት ኦሳማ አቡ ኢርሻይድ ስልክ መያዝ እና መፈተሽ ሕገ-ወጥ እንደሆነ ወስኗል። ፍርድ ቤቱ ባለሥልጣናቱ እንደዚህ ዓይነት ፍተሻዎችን ለማድረግ የሚያስችል በቂ የጥርጣሬ ምክንያት እንዳልነበራቸው ገልጿል። ይህ ውሳኔ የአክቲቪስቱን ሕገ-መንግሥታዊ መብቶች ከመንግሥት ጣልቃ ገብነት የሚከላከል ነው።
oromo: Abbaan seeraa federaalaa kan Ameerikaa, qondaalonni laayinii buufata xiyyaaraa Vaashingitanitti bilbila ogeessaafi qabsaawaa Falasxiin-Ameerikaa Usamaa Abuu Irshaayid fudhatanii sakatta'uun isaanii seeraan alaa ta'uu murteesse. Mana murtichaa akka ibsetti, qaamoleen mootummaa sakatta'iinsa kana raawwachuuf sababa ga'aa ta'e kan yakka irratti xiyyeeffatu hin qaban turan. Murteen kun mirga bu'uuraa qabsaawichaas miidhaa mootummaan irra ga'u irraa kan eeguudha.

title: Top IRS lawyer to resign post amid disagreements with Trump administration
english: Ken Kies, the top legal advisor for the US tax agency, is stepping down from his position following reports of significant conflicts with the Trump administration. Sources suggest he was pressured to leave after warning officials against inappropriately influencing tax audits for political purposes. This departure highlights ongoing concerns about the potential use of the IRS as a tool against the president's political opponents.
amharic: የአሜሪካ የገቢዎች አገልግሎት (IRS) ዋና የሕግ አማካሪ የሆኑት ኬን ኪስ ከትራምፕ አስተዳደር ጋር በተፈጠረ አለመግባባት ሥራቸውን እንደሚለቁ ተገልጿል። ባለሥልጣኑ በፖለቲካዊ ዓላማ የታክስ ምርመራ ላይ ጣልቃ እንዳይገቡ በማስጠንቀቃቸው ከኃላፊነታቸው እንዲነሱ ተደርገዋል ተብሎ ይገመታል። ይህ ክስተት የትራምፕ አስተዳደር የገቢዎች አገልግሎትን ለፖለቲካዊ ተቃዋሚዎች ማጥቂያ የመጠቀም ፍላጎት አለው ወይ የሚለውን ስጋት ከፍ አድርጓል።
oromo: Gorsaan olaanaan seeraa waajjira gibira Amerikaa (IRS), Ken Kies, bulchiinsa Prezidaant Traamp waliin wal dhabdee keessa erga galanii booda aangoo gadhiisuuf qophaa'aa jiru. Gabaasni akka agarsiisutti, Kies qajeelfama gibiraa irratti dhiibbaa siyaasaa gochuun akka hin barbaachisne akeekkachiisuu isaatiin aangoo isaanii gadhiisuuf dirqamaniiru. Haalli kun bulchiinsi Traamp waajjira gibiraa meeshaa ittiin mormitoota siyaasaa irratti tarkaanfii fudhatamu gochuuf yaada akka qabu shakkiin akka ka'u godheera.

title: Israel, Gaza and the future of US power
english: US Congressman Ro Khanna recently discussed the impact of the ongoing Israel-Gaza conflict on American global influence. During an interview, he questioned whether the United States prioritizes its geopolitical power over humanitarian principles in its alliance with Israel. The discussion highlights growing concerns regarding how this partnership affects the international credibility of the US government.
amharic: የአሜሪካው ኮንግረስ አባል ሮ ካና በእስራኤል እና ጋዛ መካከል ያለው ግጭት በአሜሪካ ዓለም አቀፍ ተጽዕኖ ላይ ስላለው ተጽዕኖ ተወያይተዋል። በቃለ መጠይቁ ወቅት፣ አሜሪካ ከእስራኤል ጋር ባላት ግንኙነት ከሰብአዊ መርሆዎች ይልቅ የራሷን የጂኦፖለቲካዊ ጥቅም ትቀድማለች ወይ የሚለውን ጥያቄ አንስተዋል። ውይይቱ ይህ ትብብር በአሜሪካ መንግስት ዓለም አቀፍ ተዓማኒነት ላይ ስላለው አሉታዊ ተጽዕኖ ያሳያል።
oromo: miseensi kongireesii Ameerikaa Ro Khannaan walitti bu'iinsi Israa'el fi Gaaza gidduutti argamu dhiibbaa inni aangoo Ameerikaa irratti qabu irratti mari'ataniiru. Marii isaaniin, Ameerikaan michummaa Israa'el waliin qabdu keessatti yeroo hundumaa faayidaa siyaasaa fi humnaa caalaatti bakka guddaa akka kennitu gaaffii keessa galchaniiru. Walta'iinsi kun amanamummaa Ameerikaa kan idil-addunyaa irratti miidhaa geessisuu danda'a jedhanii yaaddoo ibsaniiru.

title: Many Ukrainian soldiers outraged over removal of defence minister, troops tell BBC
english: Ukrainian soldiers and veterans have expressed significant anger and disappointment following President Zelensky's decision to replace Defense Minister Mykhailo Fedorov. Many troops view Fedorov as a key reformer who successfully modernized the military through technological advancements like drone integration. While some soldiers are openly protesting the move, others on the front lines remain focused on the ongoing conflict rather than political changes in the government.
amharic: የዩክሬን ወታደሮች እና የጦር አርበኞች ፕሬዝዳንት ዘለንስኪ የመከላከያ ሚኒስትሩን ሚካሂሎ ፌዶሮቭን ከስልጣን በማንሳታቸው ከፍተኛ ቁጣ እና ቅር ተሰኝተዋል። ብዙ ወታደሮች ፌዶሮቭን እንደ ዋና የለውጥ አራማጅ እና በድሮን ቴክኖሎጂ አማካኝነት ወታደራዊ አቅምን ያዘመኑ ሰው አድርገው ይቆጥሩታል። በአንዳንድ ወታደሮች መካከል የተቃውሞ ድምፆች ቢሰሙም፣ የጦር ግንባር ላይ ያሉ ሌሎች ወታደሮች ግን ከፖለቲካዊ ለውጦች ይልቅ በጦርነቱ ላይ ትኩረት አድርገው ይገኛሉ።
oromo: Loltoonni fi waraanni Yukreen Ministira Ittisaa biyyattii Mikhayilo Fedorov aangoo irraa kaafamuun isaatti gaddanii fi aaruu isaanii ibsaniiru. Loltoonni hedduun Fedorov guddina teeknoolojii fi dhimma droniin waraana Yukreen fooyyessuudhaan namoota gahee guddaa taphatan keessaa tokko ta'uun isaanii kan himan yoo ta'u, murtichi isaan mufachiiseera. Loltoonni tokko tokko murticha mormus, gareen loltootaa iddoo waraanaatti jiran garuu jijjiirama siyaasaa kanatti caalaa xiyyeeffannoon isaanii waraana irratti akka ta'e himameera.

title: One anti-war critic fined, another held as Russia clamps down on opponents
english: Russian authorities have intensified their crackdown on dissent by arresting a prominent anti-war blogger and disqualifying an opposition politician from future elections. Blogger Ilya Remeslo was jailed for allegedly spreading misinformation about the military, while politician Boris Nadezhdin was fined and barred from gathering signatures for his parliamentary bid. These actions reflect the ongoing suppression of political opposition in Russia as the government continues to silence critics of its policies.
amharic: የሩሲያ ባለሥልጣናት ጦርነትን የሚቃወም ታዋቂ ጦማሪን በማሰር እና የፖለቲካ ተቃዋሚን ከምርጫ በማገድ ተቃውሞን ማፈናቸውን ቀጥለዋል። ጦማሪው ኢሊያ ረሜስሎ በጦር ኃይሉ ላይ የሐሰት መረጃ በማሰራጨት ተጠርጥረው ታስረዋል፣ ፖለቲከኛው ቦሪስ ናዴዝዲን ደግሞ በአክራሪ ምልክቶች ምክንያት ቅጣት ተላልፎባቸው ለፓርላማ ምርጫ እንዳይወዳደሩ ታግደዋል። እነዚህ እርምጃዎች መንግሥት የመንግሥት ፖሊሲዎችን የሚተቹ ሰዎችን ዝም ለማሰኘት ያለውን ጥረት የሚያሳዩ ናቸው።
oromo: Mootummaan Ruusiyaa namoota siyaasaa fi yaada isaanii morman irratti tarkaanfii cimaa fudhachuu itti fufee jira. Biyyattii keessatti namni blogii barreessu tokko waraana mormuun isaa fi himannaa odeeffannoo sobaa babal'ise jedhamuun hidhamee jira; akkasumas siyaasaa Boris Nadezhdin jedhamuun mallattoo isaa kan 'extremist' jedhamee waamameef adabbiin irratti muramee filannoo irratti akka hirmaatu dhorkamee jira. Tarkaanfiin kun mormituu siyaasaa biyyattii keessa jiran callisiisuuf mootummaan gochaa jiru kan agarsiisu dha.

title: Magnitude 7.3 earthquake quake strikes off Mexico coast
english: A powerful 7.3 magnitude earthquake hit off the coast of southern Mexico on Friday, causing tremors that were felt in nearby Guatemala and El Salvador. While the event triggered an initial tsunami warning, officials confirmed that no major damage or casualties occurred and the threat of large waves has since passed. Local authorities have urged residents to stay cautious near the coast as they continue to monitor the situation following several aftershocks.
amharic: በአርብ ዕለት በደቡባዊ ሜክሲኮ የባህር ዳርቻ አካባቢ በሬክተር ስኬል 7.3 የሚገመት ኃይለኛ የመሬት መንቀጥቀጥ ተከስቷል። መንቀጥቀጡ በአቅራቢያው በሚገኙት ጉዋቲማላ እና ኤል ሳልቫዶርም ተሰምቷል፤ በጊዜያዊነት የሱናሚ ማስጠንቀቂያ ቢሰጥም የከፋ ጉዳት ወይም የሰው ህይወት መጥፋት አልተመዘገበም። የሱናሚው ስጋት አሁን ማለፉን ባለስልጣናት ያስታወቁ ቢሆንም፣ ነዋሪዎች ከባህር ዳርቻ አካባቢዎች ጥንቃቄ እንዲያደርጉ ተመክሯል።
oromo: Giddugaleessa cimaa 7.3 kan ta'e sochiin lafaa jimata darbe qarqara galaana Meksikoo kibbaatti mudatee jira. Sochiin kun biyyoota ollaa kan ta'an Gwaatemaalaa fi El Saalvaadoor keessattis kan dhaga'ame yoo ta'u, ergaa akeekkachiisa sunamiin darbus miidhaan guddaan ykn lubbuun darbe hin jiru. Akeekkachiisni sunamii erga darbee booda, namoonni bakka qarqara galaanaa irraa of eeggannoo akka taasisan mootummaan gorsa kenne jira.

title: How an Italian sculptor created the iconic World Cup trophy
english: The famous World Cup trophy that football fans recognize today was crafted by an Italian sculptor in 1970. This iconic design has since become the ultimate symbol of victory in the sport. It remains the centerpiece of competition as top teams continue to battle for the prize.
amharic: የዓለም ዋንጫ አሸናፊዎች የሚረከቡት ታዋቂው ዋንጫ በ1970 በጣሊያን ቅርጻ ቅርጽ ባለሙያ የተዘጋጀ ነው። ይህ ዋንጫ እግር ኳስን ለሚወዱ አድናቂዎች የድል ምልክት ሆኖ ያገለግላል። ጠንካራ ቡድኖች ለዚህ ክብር ሲሉ እርስ በእርስ መፎካከራቸውን ቀጥለዋል።
oromo: Waancaan kilaboota addunyaa kan har'a beekamu bara 1970 hayyuu soochii fi bocaa (sculptor) xaaliyaanii tokkoon kan qophaa'edha. Waancaan kun mallattoo injifannoo guddaa kan ta'e yoo ta'u, jaalattoota ispoortii biratti bakka guddaa qaba. Gareewwan gurguddoonis injifannoo kana argachuuf yeroo hunda waliin dorgomu.

title: At least two dead as heavy rains, floods strike central Texas
english: At least two dead as heavy rains, floods strike central Texas

title: Will the Canadian wildfire smoke affect Spain vs Argentina World Cup final?
english: The upcoming World Cup final between Spain and Argentina in New Jersey faces concerns due to heavy smoke from Canadian wildfires affecting air quality across the United States. While some cities are experiencing hazardous conditions, FIFA and government officials are closely monitoring the situation to ensure the event can proceed safely. Current forecasts suggest that conditions around the open-air stadium may improve by the time the match takes place.
amharic: በኒው ጀርሲ የሚካሄደው የስፔንና የአርጀንቲና የዓለም ዋንጫ ፍጻሜ ጨዋታ በካናዳ የደን ቃጠሎ ምክንያት በተከሰተው የጭስ ብክለት ስጋት ውስጥ ወድቋል። ምንም እንኳን አንዳንድ ከተሞች በከፍተኛ የአየር ብክለት ቢሰቃዩም፣ የፊፋ አመራሮችና የመንግስት አካላት ጨዋታው በሰላም እንዲጠናቀቅ ሁኔታውን በቅርበት እየተከታተሉት ነው። የአየር ሁኔታ ትንበያዎች እንደሚጠቁሙት ጨዋታው በሚካሄድበት ወቅት በስታዲየሙ አካባቢ ያለው የአየር ሁኔታ መሻሻል ሊያሳይ ይችላል።
oromo: Qophiin xumura tapha Waancaa Addunyaa kan Ispeen fi Arjantiinaa gidduutti New Jersey-tti godhamu, xuwwee bosona Kaanaadaa keessatti ka'e irraa ka'uun qulqullina qilleensaa guutuu Ameerikaatti miidhee jira. Magaalota tokko tokko keessatti qilleensichi fayyaadhaaf balaa ta'us, FIFA fi bakka buutonni mootummaa taphichi nagaadhaan akka gaggeeffamu haalicha hordofaa jiru. Raaguun qilleensaa akka ibsutti, yeroo taphichi gaggeeffamu bakka sitadiyeemichi jiruutti qilleensichi fooyya'uu danda'a.

title: US judge rules in favour of Palestinian-American activist after phone seizure
english: A US federal judge has ruled that the seizure and search of Palestinian-American activist Osama Abu Irshaid’s phones by customs officials was unconstitutional. The court found that authorities lacked reasonable suspicion to justify these actions, dismissing arguments based on past congressional letters and old photographs. This decision is being celebrated by the activist's organization as a significant victory for civil rights and pro-Palestinian advocacy.
amharic: አሜሪካዊው የፍርድ ቤት ዳኛ፣ ጉምሩክ ባለስልጣናት የፍልስጤም-አሜሪካዊውን አክቲቪስት ኦሳማ አቡ ኢርሻድ ስልኮችን መውሰዳቸው እና መፈተሻቸው ሕገ-ወጥ መሆኑን ወስነዋል። ፍርድ ቤቱ ባለስልጣናቱ ስልኮቹን ለመፈተሽ በቂ ምክንያት እንዳልነበራቸው ገልጾ፣ የቀረቡት መረጃዎች አሳማኝ እንዳልሆኑ አስታውቋል። ይህ ውሳኔ የአክቲቪስቱ ድርጅት ለሰብአዊ መብት እና ለፍልስጤም ደጋፊዎች እንቅስቃሴ እንደ ትልቅ ድል እየተቆጠረ ነው።
oromo: Abbaan seeraa federaalaa US, qondaaltonni gumuruukaa bilbila aktivistii Falasxeem-Ameerikaa Osaamaa Abuu Irshaad fudhatanii sakatta'uun isaanii seeraan alaa ta'uu murteesse. Mana murtichaa akka ibsetti, qondaaltonni kunneen hojii kana raawwachuuf sababa gahaa hin qaban turan. Murtiin kun dhaabbata aktivistichaatiin akka injifannoo guddaa mirga namoomaa fi deggeroota Falasxeem tti ilaalamaa jira.

title: US military launched fresh strikes on Iran, Central Command says
english: The United States military has carried out another series of airstrikes targeting Iranian interests. According to the US Central Command, these attacks were initiated on Friday. The official announcement provided limited details regarding the specific objectives or the scope of this new operation.
amharic: የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ኃይል በኢራን ላይ አዲስ የአየር ጥቃት መፈጸሙን አስታውቋል። የአሜሪካ ማዕከላዊ ዕዝ ጥቃቱ የተካሄደው አርብ ዕለት እንደሆነ ገልጿል። ይሁን እንጂ ስለ ጥቃቱ ዓላማ ወይም ስፋት የተዘረዘረ ተጨማሪ መረጃ እስካሁን አልተገለጸም።
oromo: Waraanni Yunaayitid Isteetes mootummaa Iraan irratti haleellaa qilleensa irraa kan biraa geggeessuu isaa beeksisera. Ajajni giddugaleessa US akka ibsetti, haleellaan kun guyyaa Jimaata geggeeffame. Haa ta'u malee, waa'ee galii ykn bal'ina haleellaa kanaa ilaalchisee odeeffannoon dabalataa waan hin kennamneef bal'inaan beekkamuu hin danda'amne.

title: EU reiterates its call on Israel to refrain from more expansion of settlements
english: The European Union has again urged Israel to stop expanding settlements in the occupied West Bank. This statement follows the Israeli government's recent decision to allocate a significant budget for the construction of 34 new settlement sites. The EU warns that these actions threaten the possibility of a future two-state solution for peace.
amharic: የአውሮፓ ህብረት በእስራኤል የተያዘው ምዕራባዊ የዮርዳኖስ ወንዝ ዳርቻ ላይ ሰፈራዎችን ማስፋፋቷን እንድታቆም ዳግም ጥሪ አቅርቧል። ይህ የህብረቱ መግለጫ የወጣው እስራኤል 34 አዳዲስ ሰፈራዎችን ለመገንባት ከፍተኛ በጀት መመደቧን ተከትሎ ነው። የአውሮፓ ህብረት እንደዚህ ያሉ ድርጊቶች ለሁለት ሀገር የመፍትሄ ሃሳብ እንቅፋት እንደሚሆኑ አስጠንቅቋል።
oromo: Gamtaan Awurooppaa Israa'el naannoo Qarxii dhihaa kan qabatte keessatti ijaarsa qubannaa babal'isuu akka dhaabdu irra dedeebi'ee gaafate. Ibsi kun kan ba'e, mootummaan Israa'el qubannaa haaraa 34 ijaaruuf baajata guddaa ramaduu ishee hordofeeti. Gamtaan Awurooppaa tarkaanfiin kun furmaata biyya lamaa kan miidhu ta'uu akeekkachiiseera.

title: Israeli general praises illegal outposts driving Palestinian ethnic cleansing
english: A top Israeli military commander, Major-General Avi Bluth, has publicly endorsed illegal settler outposts in the occupied West Bank, describing them as valuable for national security. These outposts, which are considered unlawful under both international and domestic Israeli law, are frequently criticized for displacing Palestinian communities. By framing these settlements as strategic assets, the military's stance highlights the state's ongoing support for land expansion policies.
amharic: የእስራኤል ወታደራዊ አዛዥ ሜጀር ጄኔራል አቪ ብሉዝ፣ በምዕራብ ባንክ የሚገኙ ህገ-ወጥ የሰፈራ ጣቢያዎችን ለሀገር ደህንነት አስፈላጊ ናቸው በማለት አወድሰዋል። በዓለም አቀፍም ሆነ በእስራኤል ህግ መሰረት ህገ-ወጥ የሆኑት እነዚህ ጣቢያዎች፣ ፍልስጤማውያንን ከመሬታቸው በማፈናቀል ረገድ ሚና እንዳላቸው ይነገራል። ይህ መግለጫ መንግስት ለእነዚህ ህገ-ወጥ ሰፈራዎች ያለውን ድጋፍ የሚያሳይ እንደሆነ ተገልጿል።
oromo: Ajajaan waraana Israa'el kan ta'an Mejer Jeneraal Avi Bluut, buufataaleen qonnaa kan seeraan alaa fi naannoo Qarxii dhihaatti argaman nageenya biyyaaf faayidaa qabu jechuun jajaniiru. Buufataaleen kun seera idil-addunyaa fi seera Israa'el keessattuu kan hin eeyyamamne yoo ta'u, sababa isaanitiin ummanni Falasxiin lafa isaanii irraa buqqa'aa akka jiru himama. Ibsi kun mootummaan Israa'el babal'ina buufataalee kanaaf deeggarsa qabu ifatti kan agarsiisuudha.

title: US attacks Iranian oil tanker near Kharg Island again, official says
english: United States military forces have reportedly struck an Iranian oil tanker near Kharg Island for the second time in two days. According to an Iranian official, the vessel, which was already damaged from a previous attack, was hit by two more missiles. This incident marks an escalation in tensions near the vital oil export facility.
amharic: የአሜሪካ ኃይሎች በሁለት ቀናት ውስጥ ለሁለተኛ ጊዜ በኢራን የነዳጅ መጫኛ መርከብ ላይ ጥቃት መፈጸማቸውን የኢራን ባለስልጣናት አስታውቀዋል። ቀደም ሲል ጉዳት ደርሶበት የነበረው መርከብ በሁለት ተጨማሪ ሚሳኤሎች መመታቱ ተገልጿል። ይህ ክስተት በካርግ ደሴት አካባቢ ያለውን ውጥረት አባብሶታል።
oromo: Humnootiin Ameerikaa guyyoota lama keessatti yeroo lammaffaaf doonii boba'aa Iraan gubbaa Khargitti argamu irratti haleellaa raawwachuu isaanii qondaalonni Iraan beeksisan. Dooniin kun kanaan dura haleellaa irra gahee ture yoo ta'u, amma immoo misa'ela lamaan kan biroon rukutameera. Gochi kun naannoo buufata boba'aa sanaatti miira wal-dhabdee kan guddiste dha.

title: EU proposes slowing down cuts to carbon emissions for businesses
english: The European Union is planning to relax its emissions trading rules to provide businesses with more time to transition to greener technologies. Under these proposed changes, industries would have until 2038 to meet certain reduction targets, extended from the previous 2034 deadline. This initiative aims to maintain environmental goals while easing the financial burden on companies, though the proposal still requires formal approval from EU member states.
amharic: የአውሮፓ ህብረት ንግድ ድርጅቶች ወደ አረንጓዴ ቴክኖሎጂ ለመሸጋገር ተጨማሪ ጊዜ እንዲያገኙ የልቀት ንግድ ደንቦቹን ለማላላት አቅዷል። በእነዚህ የቀረቡ ለውጦች መሰረት፣ ኢንዱስትሪዎች የተወሰኑ የልቀት ቅነሳ ግቦችን ለማሳካት ከነበረው የ2034 የጊዜ ገደብ ወደ 2038 እንዲራዘምላቸው ይደረጋል። ይህ እርምጃ የአካባቢ ጥበቃ ግቦችን እየጠበቀ በኩባንያዎች ላይ ያለውን የገንዘብ ጫና ለመቀነስ ያለመ ሲሆን፣ ሃሳቡ አሁንም በአውሮፓ ህብረት አባል ሀገራት ይሁንታ ማግኘት ይጠበቅበታል።
oromo: Gamtaan Awurooppaa dhaabbileen daldalaa gara teeknoolojii qulqulluutti ce’uuf yeroo gahaa akka argatanif seera daldala gadi lakkisa gaazii mijataa ta’e diriirsuuf karoorfateera. Jijjiiramoota kana keessatti, industiriileen gadi lakkisa gaazii hir’isuuf hanga bara 2038 yeroo akka argatan kan taasisu yoo ta’u, kunis yeroo duraan kenname bara 2034 irraa dheerateera. Karoorri kun galmoota naannoo eeguu wajjin walqabatee ba’ii maallaqaa dhaabbilee irratti jiru salphisuuf kan kaayyeffate yoo ta’u, hanga ammaatti garuu mootummoota miseensa Gamtaan Awurooppaa biratti mirkanaa’uu qaba.

title: China hits out at British Steel nationalisation
english: The Chinese government has strongly criticized the UK's decision to nationalize British Steel, which was previously owned by the Chinese company Jingye Group. Beijing claims this move violates investment treaties and harms the rights of Chinese investors, while the UK government maintains that the action was necessary to protect jobs and national interests. This dispute creates a diplomatic challenge for the incoming British administration as it tries to balance national economic priorities with international relations.
amharic: የቻይና መንግስት በቻይናው ጂንግዬ ግሩፕ ባለቤትነት ስር የነበረውን የብሪቲሽ ስቲል ኩባንያ የብሪታንያ መንግስት በቁጥጥር ስር ማዋሉን በከፍተኛ ሁኔታ ተችቷል። ቤጂንግ ይህ ድርጊት የኢንቨስትመንት ስምምነቶችን የጣሰ እና የቻይና ባለሀብቶችን መብት የሚጎዳ ነው ስትል ትከሳለች። የብሪታንያ መንግስት በበኩሉ እርምጃውን የወሰደው የስራ እድሎችን ለመጠበቅ እና ሀገራዊ ጥቅምን ለማስከበር እንደሆነ ያስረዳል። ይህ አለመግባባት የብሪታንያ አዲሱ መንግስት ከቻይና ጋር ያለውን ዲፕሎማሲያዊ ግንኙነት እና የኢኮኖሚ ጥቅም ለማመጣጠን ፈታኝ ሁኔታ ፈጥሯል።
oromo: Mootummaan Chaayinaa murtee mootummaan Breetaan qabeenya kampaanii Chaayinaa 'Jingye Group' kan ta'e 'British Steel' gara qabeenya mootummaatti akka jijjiirame mormi cimaa dhiyeesseera. Chaayinaan tarkaanfiin kun waliigaltee invastimentii kan cabsee fi mirga abbootii qabeenya Chaayinaa kan miidhu ta'uu ibsiteerti; mootummaan Breetaan garuu tarkaanfichaa hojiiwwan eeguufi fayyadamummaa biyyaaf barbaachisaa ta'uu ibseera. Wal-dhabdeen kun mootummaan Breetaan haaraan dhufee walitti dhufeenya Chaayinaa wajjin jiruufi faayidaa dinagdee biyyattii gidduutti madaallii eeggachuuf qoramuu isaatti agarsiisa.

title: At least three killed and hundreds displaced by heavy rain in Chile
english: Severe storms and heavy rainfall in central and southern Chile have resulted in at least three deaths and the displacement of hundreds of residents. President Jose Antonio Kast is currently assessing the damage in the hardest-hit regions while emergency services manage widespread power outages and ongoing evacuation efforts. The extreme weather has also forced school closures and interrupted operations at major industrial sites, including mining facilities.
amharic: በቺሊ መካከለኛ እና ደቡባዊ ክፍሎች በጣለው ከባድ ዝናብ እና በተከሰተው አውሎ ንፋስ ቢያንስ ሶስት ሰዎች ህይወታቸው አልፏል፣ በመቶዎች የሚቆጠሩም ከቤታቸው ተፈናቅለዋል። የሀገሪቱ ፕሬዝዳንት ሆሴ አንቶኒዮ ካስት በጉዳቱ የተጎዱ አካባቢዎችን በመጎብኘት ላይ ሲሆኑ፣ የነፍስ አድን ሰራተኞች የኤሌክትሪክ መቆራረጥን እና የለቀቃ ስራዎችን እያከናወኑ ይገኛል። ይህ የተፈጥሮ አደጋ በትምህርት ቤቶች እና በዋና ዋና የኢንዱስትሪ ማዕከላት ላይ ከፍተኛ ተጽዕኖ አሳድሯል።
oromo: Roobni cimaafi bubbeen humna qabu biyya Chiilii keessatti mudateen namoonni sadu du'aniiru, dhibbaan lakkaa'aman ammoo qe'ee isaanii irraa buqqa'aniiru. Pirezidaantiin biyyattii Jose Antonio Kast bakkeewwan miidhaan irra ga'e daawwachaa kan jiran yoo ta'u, tajaajilli birmannaa hatattamaa humna ibsaa deebisuufi namoota gargaaruuf carraaqqii gochaa jiru. Balaan kun barnootaafi qulqulleessa maayinii dabalatee hojiilee industirii biyyattii irratti dhiibbaa guddaa uumeera.

title: All-time West Indies cricket great Garfield Sobers dies aged 89
english: Legendary West Indies cricketer Sir Garfield Sobers has passed away at the age of 89. Widely considered one of the sport's greatest all-rounders, he was famous for his exceptional batting, bowling, and fielding skills, including a historic world-record innings of 365 not out. Throughout his impressive career between 1954 and 1974, he set numerous milestones, such as being the first player to hit six sixes in a single over.
amharic: የዌስት ኢንዲስ የክሪኬት ኮከብ ሰር ጋርፊልድ ሶበርስ በ89 ዓመታቸው ከዚህ ዓለም በሞት ተለይተዋል። በስፖርቱ ታሪክ ውስጥ ከታላላቅ ተጫዋቾች አንዱ ተደርገው የሚወሰዱት ሶበርስ፣ በአስደናቂ የባቲንግ፣ የቦውሊንግ እና የመከላከል ብቃታቸው ይታወቁ ነበር። ከ1954 እስከ 1974 በነበራቸው የጨዋታ ዘመን በአንድ ኦቨር ስድስት ስድስት ራኖችን በመምታት የመጀመሪያው ተጫዋች በመሆን እና በ365 ራኖች የዓለም ክብረ ወሰን በማስመዝገብ የማይረሱ ስኬቶችን ተጎናጽፈዋል።
oromo: Leencichi taphataa kirikeetii West Indies Sir Gaarfiild Soobarsi waggaa 89tti du'aan addunyaa kanarraa boqotaniiru. Taphatoota addunyaa kanaa keessaa namoota dandeettii guutuu qaban keessaa tokko kan turan Soobarsi, ogummaa isaanii kan isaan beeksisan batingiifi boolingii adda ta'een ture. Bara 1954 hanga 1974 tti taphatanii turan keessatti, seenaa kirikeetii keessatti namoota milkaa'ina guddaa galmeessisan keessaa tokko ta'uun, taphatoota ooveri tokko keessatti 'siix siixes' galchanii fi qabxii guddaa 365 galchuun riikordii hedduu cabsuun ni yaadatamu.

title: Germany’s Merz hails nuclear deterrence cooperation with France
english: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz and French President Emmanuel Macron have announced plans for Germany to participate in French nuclear military exercises for the first time. This initiative aims to strengthen European defense self-reliance as concerns grow regarding the stability of US commitments to NATO. However, officials emphasized that this partnership serves as a supplement to, rather than a replacement for, existing NATO nuclear security agreements.
amharic: የጀርመን ቻንስለር ፍሬድሪክ ሜርዝ እና የፈረንሳይ ፕሬዝዳንት ኢማኑኤል ማክሮን ጀርመን ለመጀመሪያ ጊዜ በፈረንሳይ የኒውክሌር ወታደራዊ ልምምዶች ላይ እንደምትሳተፍ አስታውቀዋል። ይህ ውጥን የአሜሪካ ለኔቶ ያላት ቁርጠኝነት አጠያያቂ እየሆነ በመምጣቱ የአውሮፓን የራስ መከላከያ አቅም ለማጠናከር ያለመ ነው። ይሁን እንጂ ሁለቱም መሪዎች ይህ ትብብር የነባሩን የኔቶ የኒውክሌር ደህንነት ስምምነቶች የሚተካ ሳይሆን፣ እንደ ተጨማሪ ድጋፍ የሚታይ መሆኑን አረጋግጠዋል።
oromo: Kansalarri Jarman Firedrich Merz fi Pirezedantiin Faransaay Imanueel Maakroon, Jarmanin yeroo jalqabaaf leenjii waraana niwuukilaraa kan Faransaay irratti hirmaachuuf akka jirtu beeksisaniiru. Tarkaanfin kun sodaa biyyoonni Awurooppaa gargaarsa Ameerikaan naatoof qabdu irratti qaban xiqqeessuuf kan gargaaru dha. Haa ta'u malee, hoggantoonni kunneen tumsi kun kan naatoo bakka bu'u utuu hin taane, deeggarsa dabalata kan ta'eefi nageenya naannichaaf murteessaa ta'uu isaa ibsaniiru.

title: Beyond LNG: Berlin’s red-carpet diplomacy signals a bigger bet on Algeria
english: Germany is actively strengthening its economic and political partnership with Algeria to secure new energy sources following the loss of Russian gas supplies. During President Tebboune’s official visit to Berlin, the two nations signed thirty agreements covering sectors such as hydrogen, rare minerals, manufacturing, and traditional gas exports. This collaboration marks a significant shift in diplomatic relations, as Germany seeks to stabilize its energy future through long-term industrial and technological cooperation with Algeria.
amharic: ጀርመን ከሩሲያ የነበራትን የጋዝ አቅርቦት ካጣች በኋላ የኃይል ምንጮቿን ለማረጋገጥ ከአልጄሪያ ጋር ያላትን የኢኮኖሚና የፖለቲካ ግንኙነት እያጠናከረች ትገኛለች። የፕሬዚዳንት ተቡን በበርሊን ጉብኝት ወቅት ሁለቱ አገራት በሃይድሮጅን፣ በከበሩ ማዕድናት፣ በማኑፋክቸሪንግ እና በጋዝ ንግድ ላይ የሚያተኩሩ ሠላሳ ስምምነቶችን ተፈራርመዋል። ይህ ትብብር ጀርመን በኢንዱስትሪና በቴክኖሎጂ ዘርፍ ከአልጄሪያ ጋር በመተባበር የኃይል አቅርቦቷን ለማረጋጋት የምታደርገው ጥረት አካል ነው።
oromo: Jarmaniin gabaa gaazii Raashiyaa erga dhabdee booda, fedhii anniisaa ishee guuttachuuf biyya Aljeeriyaa wajjin hariiroo diinagdee fi siyaasaa cimaa uumuuf carraaqaa jirti. Daawwannaa pirezidaantii Aljeeriyaa kan biyya Jarman irratti, biyyoonni lameen walii-galtee 30 kanneen akka haayidiroojiinii, maayinyoota gati-jabeeyyii, oomisha indaastirii fi ergaa gaazii irratti xiyyeeffatan mallatteessaniiru. Tumsi kun, Jarmaniin damee indaastirii fi teeknooloojiitiin Aljeeriyaa wajjin hiriiruun gabaa anniisaa ishee tasgabeessuuf yaalii gootu agarsiisa.

title: Can the US and Iran reach a lasting deal to end the conflict?
english: The United States and Iran are experiencing renewed military conflict shortly after attempting to establish a peace agreement. Tensions escalated following Iranian attacks on vessels near the Strait of Hormuz, prompting the US to launch retaliatory airstrikes. President Trump maintains that military pressure is necessary for negotiations, while Iran remains defiant against US actions.
amharic: አሜሪካ እና ኢራን ሰላማዊ ስምምነት ለማድረግ ጥረት ካደረጉ ከጥቂት ጊዜ በኋላ እንደገና ወደ ወታደራዊ ግጭት ውስጥ ገብተዋል። ውጥረቱ የተባባሰው ኢራን በሆርሙዝ የባህር ዳርቻ በሚያልፉ መርከቦች ላይ ጥቃት መፈጸሟን ተከትሎ አሜሪካ የአየር ድብደባ በመክፈቷ ነው። ፕሬዝዳንት ትራምፕ ከኢራን ጋር ለመደራደር ወታደራዊ ኃይል መጠቀም አስፈላጊ እንደሆነ ሲገልጹ፣ ኢራን ግን የአሜሪካን ግፊት እንደማትቀበል አስታውቃለች።
oromo: Ameerikaan fi Iraan waliigaltee nagaa gochuuf yaalii erga godhaniin booda, yeroodhuma gabaabaa keessatti gara waraanaatti deebi'aniiru. Walitti bu'iinsi kun kan hammaate erga Iraan dooniiwwan karaa Hormuz darban irratti dhukaasa bantee booda Ameerikaan tarkaanfii waraanaa fudhachuu isheetin dha. Prezidaanti Traamp marii gochuuf humna waraanaa fayyadamuun barbaachisaa akka ta'e kan amanan yoo ta'u, Iraan immoo dhiibbaa Ameerikaa akka hin fudhanne beeksisiteetti.

title: Second tanker in three months hijacked off Yemen by suspected Somali pirates
english: A tanker named MT Astana has been hijacked by armed men in the Gulf of Aden near the coast of Yemen. Somali security officials confirmed that the attackers originated from the Puntland region, marking the second such incident in this area in just three months. This resurgence of piracy in the Gulf of Aden is concerning, especially as the region receives less naval security compared to the nearby Indian Ocean.
amharic: ኤምቲ አስታና የተባለ የነዳጅ ማመላለሻ መርከብ በየመን የባህር ዳርቻ አቅራቢያ በሚገኘው ኤደን ባሕረ ሰላጤ በታጠቁ ሰዎች ታግቷል። የሶማሊያ የጸጥታ ባለስልጣናት እንደገለጹት ጥቃቱን የፈጸሙት ከፑንትላንድ ክልል የተነሱ ሰዎች ሲሆኑ፣ ይህም በአካባቢው በሶስት ወራት ውስጥ የተከሰተ ሁለተኛው ተመሳሳይ የጠለፋ ድርጊት ነው። በአካባቢው የባህር ላይ ወንበዴነት ዳግም መከሰቱ አሳሳቢ ሆኗል፣ ይህም በከፊል ከአካባቢው ደካማ የባህር ኃይል ጥበቃ ጋር የተያያዘ ነው ተብሏል።
oromo: Markabni boba'aa 'MT Astana' jedhamu tokko Galaana Eeden, qarqara biyya Yamanitti humnoota hidhataniin butameera. Aangoonni nageenyaa Somaaliyaa akka ibsanitti, shakkamtoonni kunneen naannoo Puntlaandii irraa kan dhufan yoo ta'u, kunis ji'oota sadan darban keessatti naannicha keessatti yeroo lammaffaaf gosa weerara akkanaa kan mudatedha. Hojiin saaminsa galaanaa kun naannicha keessatti irra deebi'ee mudachuun isaa kan yaaddessu yoo ta'u, gariin isaa ammoo naannicha keessatti eegumsi humna galaanaa hir'achuu isaatiin walqabata.

title: Air conditioner sparked deadly blaze at children's orphanage - police
english: A tragic fire at an orphanage in Algeria's capital, Algiers, resulted in the deaths of 11 people, including children and a staff member. Police investigators determined that the blaze was triggered by an electrical issue in an air-conditioning unit that had been running constantly during a severe heatwave. The incident has caused widespread outrage, leading to calls for a formal investigation into potential safety negligence and a nationwide review of fire protection standards in public facilities.
amharic: በአልጄሪያ ዋና ከተማ አልጀርስ በሚገኝ ወላጅ አልባ ህጻናት ማቆያ በደረሰ የእሳት አደጋ የህጻናትን እና የአንድ ሰራተኛን ህይወት ጨምሮ 11 ሰዎች ህይወታቸው አልፏል። የፖሊስ ምርመራ እንደሚያሳየው እሳቱ የተነሳው በከባድ ሙቀት ምክንያት ያለማቋረጥ ይሰራ የነበረው የአየር ማቀዝቀዣ በመበላሸቱ ነው። ይህ አሳዛኝ ክስተት በሀገሪቱ ከፍተኛ ቁጣን ቀስቅሷል፤ የህዝብ ተወካዮችም የደህንነት ጉድለቶች እንዲመረመሩ እና በሁሉም የህዝብ ተቋማት ላይ ጥብቅ የእሳት አደጋ መከላከያ ፍተሻ እንዲደረግ ጥሪ አቅርበዋል።
oromo: Magaalaa guddoo Aljeeriyaa Aljeersitti bakka ijoollee harka qalleeyyii itti guddifamanitti ibidda hamaan ka’een ijoollee fi hojjetaa tokko dabalatee namoonni 11 du’aniiru. Qorannoon poolisii akka mirkaneessetti, ibidichi kan ka’e qilleensa ho’aa cimaa keessa yeroo dheeraaf hojjetaa kan ture maashinii qabbaneessaa (air conditioner) irraa ta’uu ibsameera. Balaan kun biyyattii keessatti aarii guddaa kan uume yoo ta’u, namoonni dhimmi kun qoratamee, hanqinni nageenyaa jiraannaan tarkaanfiin akka fudhatamu fi dhaabbilee uummataa hunda keessatti sirni ittisa ibiddaa akka sakatta’amu gaafachaa jiru.

title: Burnham elected Labour leader, vows new direction for UK
english: Andy Burnham has been officially named the new leader of the UK's Labour Party, positioning him to become the next prime minister. During his victory speech, he expressed a strong commitment to moving away from the political and economic strategies of the past forty years. He promised to introduce a fresh approach to lead the country in a new direction.
amharic: አንዲ በረንሃም የእንግሊዝ ሌበር ፓርቲ አዲሱ መሪ ሆነው የተመረጡ ሲሆን በሚቀጥለው ሳምንት ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ሆነው እንደሚሾሙ ይጠበቃል። በመጀመሪያ ንግግራቸውም ባለፉት አርባ ዓመታት ሲከተሏቸው የነበሩትን ያልተሳኩ የፖለቲካ እና የኢኮኖሚ ስልቶች በመተው አዲስ አቅጣጫ እንደሚቀይሱ ቃል ገብተዋል። ለሀገሪቱ የተሻለ ለውጥ ለማምጣትም አዲስ የሥራ አመራር ዘይቤ እንደሚከተሉ አስታውቀዋል።
oromo: Andii Barnhaam gaggeessaa haaraa paartii Leebar kan biyya Ingiliz ta'uun filatameera, kunis torban dhufu keessa muummicha ministeeraa ta'uuf akka isa dandeessisu ibsameera. Haasaa isaa jalqabaa keessatti, siyaasaa fi dinagdee kutaalee darban keessatti bu'aa hin qabne jijjiiruuf waadaa galeera. Biyyattii gara fuulduraatti tarkaanfachiisuuf karaan haaraa akka qabatu ibseera.

title: Did the US just start a trade war with Brazil?
english: Donald Trump has introduced a 25% tariff on products imported from Brazil, leading to fears of a trade conflict between the two nations. In response, Brazilian officials have signaled their intent to retaliate against these new trade barriers. Experts suggest that this rising economic tension could significantly influence the outcome of upcoming elections in Brazil.
amharic: ዶናልድ ትራምፕ ከብራዚል በሚገቡ ምርቶች ላይ የ25 በመቶ ቀረጥ መጣላቸው በሁለቱ አገራት መካከል የንግድ ጦርነት ሊቀሰቀስ ይችላል የሚል ስጋት ፈጥሯል። ብራዚልም ለዚህ ውሳኔ አጸፋዊ እርምጃ እንደምትወስድ አስታውቃለች። ይህ የኢኮኖሚ ውጥረት በብራዚል የውስጥ ፖለቲካ እና መጪው ምርጫ ላይ ተጽዕኖ ሊያሳድር እንደሚችል ባለሙያዎች ይናገራሉ።
oromo: Donald Trump meeshaalee biyya Brazil irraa gara Ameerikaa galan irratti gibira 25% ta'e erga kaa'ee booda, biyyoota lamaan gidduutti waraanni daldalaa akka uumamu sodaan jira. Mootummaan Brazilis murtee kana irratti haaloo ba'uuf qophii ta'uu ishee ibsiteetti. Hayyoonni akka jedhanitti, dhiibbaan diinagdee kun filannoo biyyattii keessatti dhiibbaa guddaa qabaachuu danda'a.

title: Iranian forces: missiles and drones fired at US targets in Gulf States
english: Iranian military forces have launched a significant retaliatory attack against American targets located across several Gulf nations. This escalation follows an overnight United States strike inside Iranian territory that resulted in the deaths of at least eight individuals. This development marks the most serious increase in regional tensions since a mutual agreement was established between the parties in mid-June.
amharic: የኢራን ወታደራዊ ኃይሎች በተለያዩ የባህረ ሰላጤው አገራት በሚገኙ የአሜሪካ ኢላማዎች ላይ ከፍተኛ ጥቃት መፈጸማቸውን አስታውቀዋል። ይህ እርምጃ የተወሰደው በኢራን ግዛት ውስጥ በአሜሪካ በተፈጸመ ጥቃት ቢያንስ ስምንት ሰዎች ከተገደሉ በኋላ ነው። ይህ ክስተት ሰኔ 17 ቀን ከተደረሰው ስምምነት በኋላ በክልሉ የታየው እጅግ አደገኛ የሆነ የቀውስ መባባስ ነው።
oromo: Humnoonni waraana Iraan biyyoota Gulf jedhaman keessa kan argaman kaayyoo Ameerikaa irratti haleellaa cimaa raawwataniiru. Tarkaanfiin kun kan dhufe erga Ameerikaan biyya Iraan keessatti haleellaa ganama sa'aatii keessa raawwattee namoota saddeet ajjeestee booda dha. Haalli kun erga waliigalteen ji'a Waxabajjii keessa mallatteeffamee as, walitti bu'iinsa naannichaa keessatti kan hammaate ta'uu ibsameera.

title: Apple regains top spot as world’s most valuable company
english: Apple has once again become the world's most valuable company, reaching a market valuation of $4.88 trillion and narrowly surpassing Nvidia. This shift follows a recent decline in Nvidia's stock and growing investor confidence in Apple's ability to monetize artificial intelligence through its new Siri features. Meanwhile, the company is preparing for a leadership transition as CEO Tim Cook plans to hand over control to John Ternus in September.
amharic: አፕል የ4.88 ትሪሊዮን ዶላር የገበያ ዋጋ በመድረስ እንደገና የአለማችን ተፅዕኖ ፈጣሪ እና ዋጋ ያለው ኩባንያ ሆኗል። ይህ እድገት የተመዘገበው የኤንቪዲያ የገበያ ዋጋ በትንሹ በመቀነሱ እና ባለሃብቶች አፕል አዲሱን የሲሪ (Siri) ሰው ሰራሽ አስተውሎት ቴክኖሎጂውን በመጠቀም ገቢ ለማግኘት ባለው አቅም ላይ እምነት በመጣላቸው ነው። በሌላ በኩል ኩባንያው የረጅም ጊዜ ዋና ስራ አስኪያጁ ቲም ኩክ ስልጣናቸውን ለጆን ተርነስ በሴፕቴምበር ወር እንደሚያስረክቡ አስታውቋል።
oromo: Apple gatii gabaa tiriliyoona 4.88 ga'uun ammas dhaabbata addunyaa irratti gatii guddaa qabu ta'eera. Jijjiiramni kun kan dhufe gatiin gabaa Nvidia xiqqoo gad bu'uu fi abbootiin qabeenyaa dandeettii Apple teeknoolojii Siri haaraa fayyadamuun bu'aa argachuuf qabu irratti amantii waan horataniif. Gammachuu kanaan walqabatee, Apple gaggeessaan isaanii Tim Cook ji'a Fulbaana keessa aangoo isaanii gara John Ternus tti dabarsuuf qophiirra jiraachuu beeksiseera.

title: Amazon’s Zoox recalls self-driving vehicles amid emergency response issues
english: Amazon’s autonomous vehicle subsidiary, Zoox, is recalling its fleet of 105 robotaxis due to safety concerns regarding their interaction with emergency scenes. The decision follows reports that these vehicles struggle to identify heavy smoke, occasionally entering fire sites and obstructing first responders. To fix this, the company is deploying a software update designed to better detect hazardous conditions and respond appropriately to emergency operations.
amharic: የአማዞን ንዑስ ኩባንያ የሆነው ዙክስ (Zoox)፣ በድንገተኛ አደጋ ወቅት የሚያሳዩትን የደህንነት ችግር ተከትሎ 105 የሚሆኑ አውቶማቲክ ተሽከርካሪዎቹን እያስታወሰ ነው። ይህ እርምጃ የተወሰደው ተሽከርካሪዎቹ በቦታው ላይ ያለውን ጥቅጥቅ ያለ ጭስ ባለመለየት የእሳት አደጋ መከላከያ ሰራተኞችን ስራ በማስተጓጎላቸው ነው። ኩባንያው ችግሩን ለመቅረፍ ተሽከርካሪዎቹ አደገኛ ሁኔታዎችን በተሻለ መንገድ እንዲለዩ የሚያግዝ የሶፍትዌር ማሻሻያ እያዘጋጀ ይገኛል።
oromo: Dameen dhaabbata Amazon kan ta’e Zoox, konkolaattoonni ofiin of oofan 105 ta’an rakkoo nageenyaa yeroo gargaarsa ariifachiisaa mudatu hordofee akka deebi’an murteesseera. Murtoon kun kan dhufe konkolaattoonni kunneen aara baay'ee jiru addaan baasuu dadhabuun isaanii fi yeroo gargaarsi ariifachiisaan barbaadamu akka gufuutti dhaabbachuu isaanii hordofee dha. Rakkoo kana furuuf, dhaabbatichi software haarawaa konkolaattoonni kunneen haala balaa fi qulqullina aaraa akka sirriitti hubatan gargaaruu danda'u diriirsuuf karoorfateera.

title: Pakistan cricketer Nawaz sanctioned after cannabis-related positive test
english: Pakistan cricket player Mohammad Nawaz has received a three-month suspension from the ICC after testing positive for a cannabis-related substance. Nawaz acknowledged the violation but clarified that the substance was used outside of competition and did not improve his sporting performance. Consequently, his match results from February through May have been disqualified, though he may return sooner by completing a rehabilitation program.
amharic: የፓኪስታኑ ክሪኬት ተጫዋች መሐመድ ናዋዝ ከካናቢስ ጋር የተያያዘ ንጥረ ነገር በደሙ ውስጥ በመገኘቱ የአለም አቀፍ የክሪኬት ምክር ቤት የሶስት ወር እገዳ ጥሎበታል። ተጫዋቹ ጥፋቱን አምኖ ቢቀበልም፣ ንጥረ ነገሩን የተጠቀመው ከውድድር ውጪ እና ለስፖርታዊ ብቃት ማሳደጊያ እንዳልሆነ አስረድቷል። በዚህም ምክንያት ከየካቲት እስከ ግንቦት ባለው ጊዜ የነበሩት የጨዋታ ውጤቶቹ የተሰረዙ ሲሆን፣ ተሃድሶ ፕሮግራም በማጠናቀቅ ወደ ስራው በፍጥነት መመለስ ይችላል።
oromo: Taphatoon kirikeetii Paakistaan Mohaammad Nawaaz qorannoo fayyaa irratti qoricha 'kanaabisiin' walqabatu argamuun isaa erga mirkanaa'ee booda, gamtaan kirikeetii adunyaa ji'a sadiif isa dhorkeera. Nawaaz badii isaa kan amane yoo ta'u, qorichicha kan fayyadame tapha ala fi guddina qophii isaa irratti dhiibbaa uumuuf akka hin taane ibseera. Bu'aan tapha isaa ji'a Guraandhalaa hanga Caamsaa ture kan haqame yoo ta'u, sagantaa deebisanii dhaabuu xumuruun gara taphaatti deebi'uu danda'a.

title: Israeli attacks on Gaza kill 14, including mourners attending funeral
english: Israeli military operations across Gaza have resulted in the deaths of at least 14 Palestinians, with many others injured. A significant drone strike specifically targeted a funeral procession for a victim of an earlier attack, highlighting ongoing violations of the ceasefire. Despite an official truce, reports indicate that Israeli aggression in the region has actually intensified over the past few months.
amharic: በጋዛ በተፈጸመ ተከታታይ የእስራኤል ጥቃት ቢያንስ 14 ፍልስጤማውያን መገደላቸው እና ቁጥራቸው ያልታወቀ ሰዎች መቁሰላቸው ተዘግቧል። ከሞቱት መካከል አብዛኛዎቹ የቀብር ሥነ-ሥርዓት ላይ በነበሩ ሰዎች ላይ በተፈጸመ የድሮን ጥቃት የተገደሉ ናቸው። በስምምነት ላይ ያለው የተኩስ አቁም ቢኖርም እስራኤል ጥቃቷን አጠናክራ መቀጠሏ አሳሳቢ ሆኗል።
oromo: Humni waraana Israa'el ganda Gaza keessatti haleellaa raawwateen namoonni 14 ol ajjeefamaniiru, hedduunis madaa'aniiru. Haleellaan kunneen keessaa inni guddaan kan raawwatame yeroo namoonni awwaalchaaf walgahanii turanitti yommuu ta'u, kunis waldhabdee jiru kan caalatti hammeesseedha. Waraanni Israa'el walii galtee tasgabii erga mallatteeffamee boodas, haleellaa ishee iddoo gara garaatti itti fufuun ishee gabaafameera.

title: IRGC Navy says ‘zero hour’ approaching for operation against US naval units
english: The Iranian Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) Navy claims it is monitoring all American military equipment and personnel in the region. Iranian officials have warned that US naval forces are nearing a critical point that could trigger a military operation against them. Tensions remain high as Iran signals its readiness to take action against the American military presence in nearby waters.
amharic: የኢራን እስላማዊ አብዮታዊ ዘበኛ ኃይል የባህር ኃይል በአካባቢው ያሉ የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ መሳሪያዎችንና ሰራተኞችን በቁጥጥር ስር እንዳዋለ አስታውቋል። የኢራን ባለስልጣናት የአሜሪካ የባህር ኃይል ክፍሎች በኢራን ኃይሎች ላይ እርምጃ ሊወሰድባቸው ወደሚችል ወሳኝ ወቅት እየተቃረቡ መሆኑን አስጠንቅቀዋል። በአካባቢው ባሉ ውሀዎች ውስጥ የአሜሪካን ወታደራዊ መገኘት ለመቃወም ኢራን ዝግጁ መሆኗን እየገለፀች ነው።
oromo: Raayyaan Ittisa Biyyaa Iraan kan IRGC jedhamu, meeshaalee waraanaa fi humnoota Ameerikaa naannichatti argaman hunda to’annoo isaa jala oolchuu isaa beeksiseera. Hojjettoonni mootummaa Iraan humnoonni galaanaa Ameerikaa tarkaanfii waraanaa irratti fudhatamuu danda'uuf gara yeroo murteessaatti dhihaachaa jiraachuu akeekkachiisaniiru. Iraan naannoo sana keessatti iddoo waraanni Ameerikaa jiru irratti tarkaanfii fudhachuuf qophiidha jechuun ibsiteetti.

title: Palestine Action defendant ‘missed the last year’ of his mother’s life while behind bars
english: William Plastow, a defendant involved in an arms factory protest, recently shared that he was imprisoned for 18 months while awaiting trial. During this period, his mother passed away from terminal cancer, causing him to miss her final year. He was eventually granted temporary release on compassionate grounds to be with her during her very last days.
amharic: በጦር መሣሪያ ፋብሪካ ተቃውሞ የተሳተፈው ዊሊያም ፕላስቶው፣ በችሎት ውሳኔ እየጠበቀ በነበረበት ወቅት ለ18 ወራት ታስሮ እንደነበር ተናግሯል። በዚህ ጊዜ ውስጥ እናቱ በጠና ታመው ሕይወታቸው በማለፉ፣ የኋለኛውን አንድ ዓመት ከእሳቸው ጋር ማሳለፍ አልቻለም። በመጨረሻም የጤና ሁኔታቸውን ከግምት በማስገባት የተፈቀደለት ጊዜ፣ የእናቱን የመጨረሻ አራት ቀናት ከጎናቸው እንዲያሳልፍ አስችሎታል።
oromo: William Plastow jedhamu inni warshaa meeshaa waraanaa irratti hiriira ba'e jedhamee himatame, ji'a 18 guutuu mana hidhaa keessa turuun isaa ibsameera. Yeroo kana keessa haati isaa dhukkuba kansaariin du'uudhaan, waggaa isa dhumaa haadha isaa bira ta'uu hin dandeenye. Dhumarrattis, haala isaa hubatanii guyyoota afran haadha isaa jiran bira akka ga'uuf hayyama argateera.

title: US military says it destroyed Iranian port surveillance tower
english: The United States military reported that it successfully destroyed an Iranian surveillance tower located at the Chabahar Shahid Kalantari Port on Thursday. According to US Central Command, the structure was part of a network used by the Iranian Revolutionary Guard to monitor and threaten commercial ships traveling through the Strait of Hormuz. This action was taken to disrupt efforts to track vessels in the Gulf of Oman region.
amharic: የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ኃይል ባለፈው ሐሙስ በኢራን የቻባሃር ሻሂድ ካላንታሪ ወደብ ላይ የሚገኝ የክትትል ግንብ ማውደሙን አስታውቋል። የአሜሪካ ማዕከላዊ ዕዝ እንደገለጸው፣ ይህ ግንብ የኢራን አብዮታዊ ዘበኛ ኃይሎች በሆርሙዝ ስትሬት የሚያልፉ የንግድ መርከቦችን ለመከታተል ይጠቀሙበት የነበረ የክትትል መረብ አካል ነበር። ይህ እርምጃ የተወሰደው በኦማን ባህረ ሰላጤ አካባቢ የሚደረገውን የመርከቦች ክትትል ለማስተጓጎል ነው።
oromo: Waraanni Amerikaa torban darbe guyyaa Kamisaa buufata Chabahar Shahid Kalantari keessatti gamoowwan waan tokko hordofuuf tajaajilu tokko akka diige beeksiseera. Ajajni giddugaleessa Amerikaa akka ibsetti, gamoowwan kun humnoota Irraan kan itti fayyadamaa turanidha. Humni kun dooniiwwan daldalaa gara Hormuz deemaniif balaa uumuu fi isaan hordofuuf itti gargaaramaa turan. Tarkaanfiin kunis kallattii galaana Omaan keessatti hordoffii dooniiwwan irratti taasifamu dhaabsisuuf kan fudhatameedha.

title: Why the World Cup final has morphed into a debate on Palestine and Israel
english: The 2026 World Cup final between Spain and Argentina has evolved into a political debate regarding the Israel-Palestine conflict. Many fans are supporting Spain due to Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez’s vocal advocacy for Palestinian statehood and his stance against the war in Gaza. Conversely, some spectators are opposing Argentina because of President Javier Milei’s close political alliance with Israel and Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu’s public support for the team. Consequently, the match is being viewed by many as a symbolic showdown between these opposing international political positions.
amharic: የ2026 የዓለም ዋንጫ ፍጻሜ በስፔን እና በአርጀንቲና መካከል የሚደረግ ጨዋታ ብቻ ሳይሆን በእስራኤል እና ፍልስጤም ግጭት ዙሪያ ትልቅ የፖለቲካ ክርክር መድረክ ሆኗል። ብዙ አድናቂዎች የስፔን ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ፔድሮ ሳንቼዝ ለፍልስጤም ነፃነት ያላቸውን ጠንካራ ድጋፍ በመደገፍ ለስፔን ድምፃቸውን እየሰጡ ነው። በሌላ በኩል፣ የአርጀንቲናው ፕሬዝዳንት ሃቪየር ሚሌይ ከእስራኤል ጋር ያላቸው የጠበቀ ግንኙነት እና የጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ቤንጃሚን ኔታንያሁ ለቡድኑ ያላቸው ድጋፍ ብዙዎችን አሳዝኗል። በዚህም ምክንያት፣ ይህ የፍጻሜ ጨዋታ በሁለቱ ሀገራት የፖለቲካ አቋም መካከል የሚደረግ ምሳሌያዊ ውጊያ ተደርጎ እየታየ ነው።
oromo: Qophiin xumura tapha Waancaa Addunyaa bara 2026 kan Ispeen fi Arjantiinaa gidduutti godhamu, tapha kubbaa miilaa qofa osoo hin taane, walitti bu'iinsa Israa'elii fi Falasxiin irratti marii siyaasaa guddaa uumee jira. Hordoftoonni hedduun, Muummeen Ministiraa Ispeen Pedro Sánchez falasxiinotaaf deggersa qaban waan agarsiisaniif, isaanis Ispeeniin deggeruuf murteessaniiru. Gama biraatiin, pirezidaantiin Arjantiinaa Javier Milei Israa'elii wajjin hariiroo cimaa qabaachuu fi Muummeen Ministiraa Israa'el Benyaamiin Neetaanyaahuun taphattoota Arjantiinaa deggeruun isaanii hordoftoota tokko tokko biratti mormii kaasee jira. Kanaafuu, taphi kun akka walitti bu'iinsa siyaasaa kanatti fudhatamee ilaalamaa jira.

title: No US troops in the region recently killed or captured, Centcom says
english: The U.S. military command has officially rejected allegations from Iran that its forces attacked a base in Syria and caused American casualties. Centcom clarified that no U.S. soldiers in the region have been harmed or taken captive. The military described these reports as completely false.
amharic: የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ዕዝ ኢራን በሶሪያ በሚገኝ የአሜሪካ ቤዝ ላይ ጥቃት በማድረስ ወታደሮችን ገድለናል ወይም ማርከናል በማለት ያቀረበችውን ክስ በይፋ አስተባብሏል። የሴንትኮም (Centcom) መግለጫ እንደሚያሳየው በክልሉ ውስጥ ምንም አይነት የአሜሪካ ወታደር አልተገደለም ወይም አልተማረከም። ወታደራዊው ተቋም እነዚህን የተሰራጩ መረጃዎች ፍጹም ሐሰት እንደሆኑ ገልጿል።
oromo: Ajajni waraana Ameerikaa himata Iraan, buufata Siiriyaa keessa jiru irratti haleellaa raawwannee waraana Ameerikaa ajjeesne ykn qabanne jechuun dhiheessite guutummaatti haaleera. Centcom akka ibsetti, naannichatti waraanni Ameerikaa tokkollee kan miidhame ykn kan booji'ame hin jiru. Waraanni Ameerikaa oduun kun dhugaa akka hin taane ibseera.

title: ‘They took our toilet’: How a settlement has squeezed a Palestinian village
english: In the West Bank village of Umm al-Khair, an illegal Israeli outpost has been established right next to the home of the al-Hathaleen family. This expansion has effectively blocked the family from accessing their own land, including the livestock enclosure they depend on for their livelihood. As a result, the family frequently struggles to feed and care for their animals, leaving them in a constant state of uncertainty about their survival and daily life.
amharic: በምዕራብ ባንክ ኡም አል-ኻየር መንደር ውስጥ ህገ-ወጥ የእስራኤል ሰፈራ በአል-ሃታሌን ቤተሰብ ቤት አጠገብ ተቋቁሟል። ይህ መስፋፋት ቤተሰቡ የራሳቸውን መሬት እና የኑሮ መሠረት የሆነውን የከብቶች ማቆያ እንዳይጠቀሙ አግዷቸዋል። በዚህም ምክንያት ቤተሰቡ እንስሳቸውን ለመመገብና ለመንከባከብ ከፍተኛ ችግር ውስጥ የገቡ ሲሆን የዕለት ተዕለት ኑሯቸውም ለከፍተኛ ስጋት ተጋልጧል።
oromo: Godinaa Lixaa Baankii keessatti, baadiyaa Umm al-Khair jedhamtu keessatti, qubannaan Israa'el seeraan alaa ta'e tokko mana maatii Al-Hathaleen cinaatti ijaarameera. Babal'inni kun maatiin kun lafa isaanii fi iddoo horiin isaanii itti oolu akka hin fayyadamne dhorkeera. Kanaan kan ka'es, maatiin sun beeylada isaanii nyaachisuu fi kunuunsuudhaaf rakkachaa jiru, akkasumas jireenyi isaanii guyyuu rakkoo fi sodaa keessa galeera.

title: Plainclothes ICE agents manhandle man during arrest attempt
english: A video recently captured two undercover ICE officers aggressively detaining a man at the Las Vegas airport, which sparked public outrage and intervention from bystanders. Following the incident, the agency clarified that the man was ultimately taken into custody at a different airport in Los Angeles for violating his visa terms. This event has led to renewed scrutiny regarding the methods used by the agency during their arrest operations.
amharic: በላስ ቬጋስ አውሮፕላን ማረፊያ በሲቪል ልብስ የለበሱ ሁለት የኢሚግሬሽን እና የጉምሩክ ማስፈጸሚያ (ICE) ወኪሎች አንድን ሰው በኃይል ለመያዝ ሲሞክሩ የሚያሳይ ቪዲዮ ከፍተኛ ትችት አስነስቷል። ተሰብሳቢዎች ጣልቃ በመግባታቸው ወኪሎቹ እሱን ሳይዙት ሄደው ነበር። በኋላም ኤጀንሲው ግለሰቡ በሎስ አንጀለስ አውሮፕላን ማረፊያ በቪዛ ጊዜ ማለፊያ ምክንያት በቁጥጥር ስር እንደዋለ አስታውቋል። ይህ ክስተት በኤጀንሲው የአያያዝ ስልቶች ላይ ያለውን ስጋት ዳግም አቀጣጥሏል።
oromo: Viidiyoon buufata xiyyaaraa Laas Veegasitti namoota uffata idilee uffatanii jiran lamaan garee ICE irraa ta'an namicha tokko humnaan qabachuu yaalan agarsiisu mormii uumee jira. Namoonni naannichatti argaman gidduu seenuudhaan namicha gargaaruun isaanii dhaabbatichi qabannicha akka dhiisu godhee ture. Boodarras, ICE namichi kun viizaa isaa darbuudhaan kan mirkanaa'eefi buufata xiyyaaraa Los Anjelesitti akka qabame ibsee jira. Ta'een kun adeemsa qabxii isaanitti fayyadamanii fi haala hojii garee kanaa irratti komii guddaa kaasee jira.

title: Ukraine suffers port attacks as protests persist over defence shake-up
english: Ukraine suffers port attacks as protests persist over defence shake-up

title: France vs England – World Cup third-place playoff: Prediction, kickoff
english: France and England are set to face off in the FIFA World Cup third-place playoff at Miami Stadium this Saturday after both teams lost their respective semifinal matches. This game serves as the final match for France's long-serving manager Didier Deschamps, marking the end of his distinguished 14-year tenure. Additionally, French star Kylian Mbappe will be looking to secure the Golden Boot award as he competes against Lionel Messi for the tournament's top scorer title.
amharic: በፊፋ የዓለም ዋንጫ ግማሽ ፍጻሜ የተሸነፉት ፈረንሳይ እና እንግሊዝ ለሦስተኛ ደረጃ የሚደረገውን ጨዋታ ቅዳሜ በሚያሚ ስታዲየም ያደርጋሉ። ይህ ጨዋታ የፈረንሳይ ብሔራዊ ቡድን አሰልጣኝ የሆኑት ዲዲዬ ዴሻምፕ ለ14 ዓመታት የቆዩበትን የስራ ዘመን የሚጨርሱበት የመጨረሻ ጨዋታ ይሆናል። በሌላ በኩል የፈረንሳይ ኮከብ ተጫዋች ኪሊያን ኤምባፔ የውድድሩ ከፍተኛ ጎል አስቆጣሪ በመሆን የጎልደን ቡት ሽልማትን ለማግኘት ይፋለማል።
oromo: Faransaayifi Ingiliiz tapha gubbaa seemi-fayinaalitti erga injifatanii booda, Wiixata kana buufata miyaamiitti tapha sadarkaa sadaffaa qabachuuf wal morkatu. Taphi kun leenjisaa garee Faransaay kan ta'an Didiyee Deeshaampiifi tajaajila waggaa 14 booda tapha isa dhumaa ta'a. Gama biraatiin, taphataan kutaaleen Faransaay Kiliiyaan Embaapee badhaasa kophee warqee (Golden Boot) argachuuf Lionel Meesii waliin morkii cimaa keessa jira.

title: Uganda school bus crash kills 20 children and 1 adult
english: A tragic bus accident in eastern Uganda claimed the lives of 20 schoolchildren and one adult, who is believed to be the school's founder, while many others remain hospitalized with injuries. The vehicle crashed while returning to Kampala from a field trip after the driver reportedly lost control and hit a rock. In response to this disaster, the Ugandan government has immediately suspended all school-related excursions across the country until further notice.
amharic: በምስራቅ ዩጋንዳ በተከሰተ አሳዛኝ የአውቶቡስ አደጋ 20 ተማሪዎች እና አንድ የትምህርት ቤቱ መስራች እንደሆኑ የሚታመኑ አዋቂ ህይወታቸው አልፏል፤ ሌሎች በርካታ ተማሪዎችም ጉዳት ደርሶባቸው ሆስፒታል ይገኛሉ። አውቶቡሱ ከጉዞ መልስ ወደ ካምፓላ እየተመለሰ ሳለ ሾፌሩ በመቆጣጠሪያው ምክንያት አደጋው ሊደርስ ችሏል። ይህንን ተከትሎ የዩጋንዳ መንግስት እስከ ሌላ ጊዜ ድረስ ሁሉም አይነት የትምህርት ቤት ጉዞዎች እንዲቆሙ ትዕዛዝ አስተላልፏል።
oromo: Ugandaa bahaatti balaa konkolaataa mudateen barattoonni 20 fi namni guddaan tokko lubbuun darbaniiru, namoonni biroo hedduunis miidhamanii hospitaala galaniiru. Konkolaataan kun imala barnootaa booda gara magaalaa Kampalaa deebi'aa osoo jiruu, darabaan to'annoo dhabee dhagaa rukutuun isaa gabaafameera. Balaa kana hordofee, mootummaan Ugandaa imalli mana barnootaa kamiyyuu hanga beeksisni biraa kennamutti akka dhaabatu ajajeera.

title: Starmer was a fabricator and a fraud. Good riddance
english: Outgoing British Prime Minister Keir Starmer has faced harsh criticism for making false claims during his final days in office. Critics, including his predecessor Jeremy Corbyn, argue that Starmer lied about the party being institutionally antisemitic and financially bankrupt during the previous leadership. These accusations are seen as a desperate attempt by Starmer to protect his own legacy after losing the support of his parliamentary colleagues.
amharic: የብሪታኒያው ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ኬይር ስታርመር በስልጣን ዘመናቸው የመጨረሻ ቀናት ላይ ሀሰተኛ መረጃዎችን በማሰራጨት ከፍተኛ ትችት ገጥሟቸዋል። የቀድሞው የፓርቲው መሪ ጄረሚ ኮርቢንን ጨምሮ በርካታ ተቺዎች ስታርመር ፓርቲው በነበሩበት ወቅት ተቋማዊ የፀረ-ሴማዊነት እና የገንዘብ ችግር እንደነበረው ተናግረዋል ያሉት ውንጀላ ሀሰት መሆኑን ይገልጻሉ። እነዚህ መግለጫዎች የራሳቸውን ስም ለመገንባት እና የፓርቲ አባላትን አመኔታ ለማግኘት የታለሙ ውሸቶች እንደሆኑ ተወስቷል።
oromo: Mummichi ministeeraa biyya Ingiliz kan ta'an Keir Starmer yeroo isaanii isa dhumaa irratti odeeffannoo dhugaarraa fagaate fayyadamuun isaanii qeeqa cimaa guddaa irra buuseera. Hoggantuu duraanii Jeremy Corbyn dabalatee, qaamoleen hedduun Starmer yeroo duraanii sana paartiin isaanii rakkoo qorannoo siyaasaa fi dinagdee keessa ture jechuun isaanii soba ta'uu dubbatu. Starmer gocha kana kan raawwatan, hojii isaanii irratti amanamummaa argachuu fi seenaa isaanii gaarii fakkeessuuf akka ta'e himameera.

title: Moroccan whistleblower reveals how Rabat used Israel's Pegasus spyware for surveillance
english: A former Moroccan intelligence official has confirmed that the government utilized Israeli-made Pegasus spyware to monitor journalists, activists, and international figures. This revelation follows a collaborative investigation by various media groups and human rights organizations that previously linked Morocco to such surveillance activities. Despite Rabat's earlier denials, these new disclosures provide further evidence regarding the state's involvement in digital espionage.
amharic: የሞሮኮ የቀድሞ የስለላ ድርጅት ባለስልጣን መንግስታቸው ጋዜጠኞችን፣ የመብት ተሟጋቾችን እና የውጭ ሀገር ባለስልጣናትን ለመሰለል በእስራኤል የተሰራውን የፔጋሰስ ሶፍትዌር እንደተጠቀመ አረጋግጠዋል። ይህ መረጃ ይፋ የሆነው በተለያዩ የመገናኛ ብዙሃን እና የሰብአዊ መብት ተቋማት በተደረገ ጥናት ነው። ሞሮኮ ቀደም ሲል ክሱ ውድቅ አድርጋ የነበረ ቢሆንም፣ አዲሱ ማስረጃ መንግስት በዲጂታል የስለላ ስራዎች ውስጥ እጁ እንዳለበት ያሳያል።
oromo: Hojjetaan qorannoo icciitii kan duraanii kan biyya Morokkoo, mootummaan isaanii gargaarsawwan isiraa'elii kan 'Pegasus' jedhaman fayyadamuun gaazexeessitoota, falmitoota mirga namoomaa fi namoota biyya alaa hordofaa akka ture mirkaneesseera. Icciitiin kun kan ba'e qorannoo dhaabbilee miidiyaa fi mirga namoomaa adda addaatiin erga taasifame boodadha. Mootummaan Morokkoo kanaan dura himannaa kana haalaa tureyyuu, ragaan haaraan kun mootummaan sun hojii hordoffii dijitaalaa keessatti hirmaachuu isaa agarsiisa.

title: Moroccan whistleblower reveals how Rabat used Israel's Pegasus spyware for surveillance
english: A former Moroccan intelligence officer has confirmed that his government used Israeli-made Pegasus spyware to monitor journalists, activists, and foreign officials. The whistleblower revealed that the high-priced software was likely gifted to Morocco by the UAE and served as a final resort for the intelligence services. These findings are supported by a collaborative international investigation that includes leaked data and internal records.
amharic: የሞሮኮ የቀድሞ የደህንነት መኮንን መንግስታቸው ጋዜጠኞችን፣ አክቲቪስቶችን እና የውጭ አገር ባለስልጣናትን ለመሰለል በእስራኤል የተሰራውን 'ፔጋሰስ' የተሰኘ የስለላ ሶፍትዌር ይጠቀም እንደነበር አረጋግጠዋል። ጠቋሚው እንዳለው ከሆነ ውድ የሆነው ይህ ሶፍትዌር የተገዛው በተባበሩት አረብ ኢምሬቶች ድጋፍ ሲሆን፣ የሞሮኮ የደህንነት መስሪያ ቤትም እንደ የመጨረሻ አማራጭ ይጠቀምበት ነበር። ይህ መረጃ የወጣው በዓለም አቀፍ የምርመራ ጋዜጠኞች ቡድን በተሰበሰቡ የውስጥ ሰነዶች እና መረጃዎች ነው።
oromo: Hojiin gurguddaan basaastotaa kanaan duraa tokko akka mirkaneessetti, mootummaan Marookoo gosa sagantaa basaasaa 'Pegasus' jedhamu kan Israa'elii hojjetame fayyadamuun gaazexeessitoota, qabsaa'ota mirga namoomaa fi namoota biyya alaa hordofaa ture. Odeeffannoon kun akka ibsutti, sagantaan baay'ee qaaliin kun biyya UAE irraa kennaa ta'ee akka kennameefii fi tajaajilli basaasaa biyyattii tarkaanfii dhumaa godhatanii itti fayyadamus himameera. Ragaaleen kun qorannoo idil-addunyaa irratti hundaa'uun, ragaalee dhokataa turan waliin qindaa'ee ifa baheera.

title: US denies military casualties in Iranian attack on command centre in Syria
english: The United States military has officially refuted claims made by Iran regarding an attack on the al-Tanf base in Syria. American officials stated that reports suggesting their soldiers were killed or captured during this alleged operation are entirely untrue. The U.S. Central Command confirmed that all personnel in the region remain safe and accounted for.
amharic: የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ዕዝ በሶሪያ በሚገኘው አል-ታንፍ የጦር ሰፈር ላይ ጥቃት እንደደረሰ እና ወታደሮች እንደተገደሉ ወይም እንደተያዙ ኢራን ያቀረበችውን ክስ ውድቅ አድርጓል። የአሜሪካ ባለስልጣናት እነዚህ ወሬዎች ፈጽሞ ከእውነት የራቁ መሆናቸውን አስታውቀዋል። በአካባቢው የሚገኙ የአሜሪካ ወታደሮች ደህና መሆናቸውንም አረጋግጠዋል።
oromo: Raayyaan ittisa biyya Amerikaa, gareen waraana Iraan buufata waraana Suuriyaa kan al-Tanf irratti haleellaa raawwachuufi waraana Amerikaa ajjeesuu ykn qabachuu isaa ibse dhugaa akka hin taane beeksiseera. Amerikaan gabaasawwan kun guutummaatti soba ta'uu fi waraanni ishee naannichatti argaman hundi nagaa akka ta'an mirkaneessiteetti.

title: Israel advances crocodile plan to stop Palestinian prisoners escaping
english: The Israeli government has changed the legal status of Nile crocodiles to allow them to be kept for security purposes. This move follows a proposal to potentially use the reptiles as a barrier around a detention center for Palestinian prisoners. The decision was made by the Environment Minister despite opposition from environmental groups and the ministry's own legal experts.
amharic: የእስራኤል መንግስት የናይል አዞዎችን በደህንነት ስራ ላይ ለማዋል የሚያስችል ህጋዊ ለውጥ አድርጓል። ይህ ውሳኔ ፍልስጤማውያን ታሳሪዎች በሚገኙበት ማረሚያ ቤት ዙሪያ አዞዎችን እንደ መከላከያ አጥር የመጠቀም ሀሳብን ተከትሎ የመጣ ነው። የአካባቢ ጥበቃ ሚኒስትሯ ይህንን እርምጃ የወሰዱት የአካባቢ ጥበቃ ቡድኖች እና የህግ አማካሪዎች ተቃውሞ ቢኖርም ነው።
oromo: Mootummaan Israa'el qileensa (crocodiles) naayil fayyadamuu akka danda'uuf seera isaanii jijjiireera. Tarkaanfiin kun hidhamtoota Falasxiin kan itti hidhaman mana hidhaa keessa jiran irratti eegumsa gochuuf jecha kan karoorfame dha. Ministeerri naannoo namoota naannoo fi gorsa seeraa irraa mormiin isaan mudateyyuu, ajaja kanaan akkaataa bofa kanneen itti fayyadamuu danda'an mirkaneessaniiru.

title: Burnham confirmed as leader of UK’s governing Labour Party, headed for PM
english: Andy Burnham has been officially named the new leader of the UK's Labour Party and is set to become prime minister this Monday. He replaces Keir Starmer, who stepped down following declining public support caused by economic difficulties and geopolitical conflicts. As the incoming leader, Burnham aims to unify the country and address the growing political challenge posed by far-right groups.
amharic: አንዲ በርንሃም የእንግሊዝ የሌበር ፓርቲ አዲሱ መሪ ሆነው የተመረጡ ሲሆን ሰኞ ዕለትም ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ሆነው ይሾማሉ። እርሳቸው የተተኩት በኢኮኖሚ ቀውስ እና በአለም አቀፍ ግጭቶች ምክንያት ድጋፋቸው የቀነሰውን ኬይር ስታርመርን ነው። አዲሱ ጠቅላይ ሚኒስትር ሀገሪቱን አንድ ለማድረግ እና በጽንፈኛ የፖለቲካ ቡድኖች እየተፈጠረ ያለውን ተግዳሮት ለመቋቋም እንደሚሰሩ ቃል ገብተዋል።
oromo: Andii Barnhaam geggeessaa haaraa paartii Leebar kan biyya Ingiliiz ta'uun mirkanaa'eera, akkasumas Wiixata dhufu kana muummicha ministeeraa ta'uuf qophiirra jira. Inni kan bakka bu'e Keer Staarmer yoo ta'u, isaanis rakkoo diinagdee fi waldhabdee addunyaa irratti hunda'uudhaan jaalatamummaan isaanii gadi bu'uusaatiin aangoorraa ka'aniiru. Barnhaam biyyattii tokko gochuu fi shoorarkaa gareewwan mirga-fayyoota (far-right) irraa dhufu ittisuuf akka hojjetu waadaa seeneera.

title: China’s Xi Jinping launches new AI alliance: What is it?
english: Chinese President Xi Jinping has introduced the World Artificial Intelligence Cooperation Organisation (WAICO), a coalition of 29 nations aimed at shaping global AI standards. During a technology summit in Shanghai, Xi emphasized that AI development should be a collaborative effort rather than dominated by a single nation, a clear critique of current United States influence. Beijing intends to use this platform to support developing nations and promote an approach to AI that prioritizes human oversight and equitable access.
amharic: የቻይናው ፕሬዝዳንት ዢ ጂንፒንግ የአለም አቀፍ አርቲፊሻል ኢንተለጀንስ የትብብር ድርጅት (WAICO) የተባለ 29 ሀገራት የተሳተፉበትን አዲስ ህብረት ይፋ አድርገዋል። በሻንጋይ በተካሄደው የቴክኖሎጂ ጉባኤ ላይ ፕሬዝዳንቱ አርቲፊሻል ኢንተለጀንስ በአንድ ሀገር የበላይነት ስር መውደቅ እንደሌለበት በመግለጽ የአሜሪካን ተጽዕኖ ተችተዋል። ቤጂንግ ይህንን ህብረት በመጠቀም ለታዳጊ ሀገራት ድጋፍ ለማድረግ እና በሰው ቁጥጥር ስር ያለ የቴክኖሎጂ አጠቃቀምን ለማበረታታት አቅዳለች።
oromo: Pirezidaantiin Chaayinaa Xi Jiinpingi dhaabbata 'World Artificial Intelligence Cooperation Organisation (WAICO)' jedhamu kan biyyoota 29 of keessatti qabatu ifa godhaniiru. Shaanghaayitti erga dubbatanii booda, teknolojii kanatti fayyadamuu fi hoogganuu irratti biyyi tokko qofa murteessuun akka hin barbaachisne ibsuun, dhiibbaa Ameerikaa irratti qeeqan dhiyeessaniiru. Chaayinaan hariiroo kana fayyadamuun biyyoota guddatutti jiran gargaaruufi teeknoloojiin kun to'annaa namaa jala akka oolu gochuuf karoora akka qaban beekameera.

title: UN urges probe into deaths in Pakistani-administered Kashmir unrest
english: The United Nations human rights chief is calling for an independent investigation into the violent clashes in Pakistani-administered Kashmir that have claimed 31 lives since June. The unrest, fueled by disputes over election seats and economic concerns, has led to a government crackdown on activists and significant internet restrictions. International officials have expressed concern over Pakistan labeling the protest group as a terrorist organization and urged a peaceful resolution to the ongoing conflict.
amharic: የተባበሩት መንግስታት ድርጅት የሰብአዊ መብት ኮሚሽነር ከሰኔ ወር ጀምሮ በፓኪስታን አስተዳደር ስር ባለው ካሽሚር ለተከሰተው እና ለ31 ሰዎች ህይወት መጥፋት ምክንያት ለሆነው ግጭት ገለልተኛ ምርመራ እንዲደረግ ጠይቀዋል። የምርጫ መቀመጫዎችን እና የኑሮ ውድነትን በሚመለከት በተነሳው ተቃውሞ ሳቢያ መንግስት በተቃዋሚዎች ላይ የወሰደው እርምጃ እና የኢንተርኔት አገልግሎት መዘጋቱ ስጋት ፈጥሯል። ዓለም አቀፍ አካላት ፓኪስታን የተቃውሞ ቡድኑን እንደ አሸባሪ መፈረጇ ተገቢ አለመሆኑን በመግለጽ ጉዳዩ በሰላማዊ መንገድ እንዲፈታ አሳስበዋል።
oromo: Hogganaan mirga namoomaa Dhaabbata Mootummoota Gamtoomanii, naannoo Kaashmir kan Paakistaaniin bulchu keessatti namoota 31 ajjeese kan ta'e walitti bu'iinsa gara jabeessa ta'e irratti qorannoon walaba ta'e akka gaggeeffamu gaafateera. Falmii iddoo filannoo fi rakkoo dinagdee irraa kan ka'e, mootummaan siviilota irratti tarkaanfiin fudhatamee fi intarneetiin dhaabbachuun isaa yaaddoo guddaa uumeera. Dhaabbatichi mootummaan Paakistaan garee siviilotaa kana akka dhaabbata shororkeessaatti ramaduun isaa kan isaan yaaddessu ta'uu fi rakkoon kun nagaadhaan akka furamu waamicha dhiyeessaniiru.

title: Satellite images show damage inside Iran’s Bushehr nuclear power plant
english: Satellite images from July 7 to 12 reveal new impact marks within Iran’s Bushehr nuclear power plant complex following recent U.S. military strikes. While local officials confirmed attacks occurred in the surrounding province, they have denied that the reactor itself was damaged. The U.S. military has not officially included the nuclear site in its list of targeted Iranian infrastructure.
amharic: በሳተላይት በተነሱ ምስሎች እንደሚያሳየው በኢራን የቡሼር የኑክሌር ኃይል ማመንጫ ጣቢያ ውስጥ በቅርቡ በተፈጸሙ የአሜሪካ ጥቃቶች ጉዳት ደርሷል። የአካባቢው ባለስልጣናት በአውራጃው ውስጥ ጥቃቶች እንደተፈጸሙ አረጋግጠው የነበረ ቢሆንም፣ የኑክሌር ማዕከሉ ላይ ግን ምንም ጉዳት እንዳልደረሰ ገልጸዋል። የአሜሪካ ወታደራዊ ኃይል የኑክሌር ጣቢያውን በዒላማዎቹ ዝርዝር ውስጥ እንዳላካተተ አስታውቋል።
oromo: Suurri sarara xiyyaaraa (satellite) torban darbe kaafame akka mul'isutti, buufata anniisaa niwukilaraa Bushehr kan Iran keessatti rukuttaa waraana Ameerikaa irraa kan ka'e miidhaan haaraan qaqqabera. Gamtaleen naannichaa naannawa sana keessatti rukuttaan raawwatamuu mirkaneessanillee, buufatni niwukilaraa mataa isaa miidhamuu isaa haalaniiru. Waraanni Ameerikaa gama isaatiin, buufata niwukilaraa kana akka bakka ganamatti (target) hin fayyadamne beeksiseera.

title: Ukraine ‘cuts off’ Crimea from Russia, plunging it into an energy crisis
english: Ukraine has successfully disrupted Russia's ability to supply fuel and energy to Crimea through a strategic drone operation named Molochka. By targeting the tankers and barges that transport oil across the Sea of Azov, Ukraine has paralyzed critical supply routes and caused a severe fuel shortage. Russian officials have admitted that they cannot guarantee regular gasoline distribution, leaving the peninsula in a deepening energy crisis.
amharic: ዩክሬን ሞሎቻካ በተሰኘ ስትራቴጂካዊ የድሮን ዘመቻ አማካይነት ሩሲያ ወደ ክሬሚያ የምታደርሰውን የነዳጅ እና የኃይል አቅርቦት ማስተጓጎል ችላለች። በአዞቭ ባህር በኩል ነዳጅ የሚያጓጉዙ መርከቦችን በማጥቃት የሩሲያን አቅርቦት ያቆመች ሲሆን ይህም በክልሉ ከፍተኛ የነዳጅ እጥረት እንዲፈጠር አድርጓል። የሩሲያ አስተዳዳሪዎች በበኩላቸው ነዳጅን በመደበኛነት ማቅረብ እንደማይችሉ በማመናቸው፣ ክሬሚያ አሁን ከፍተኛ የኃይል ቀውስ ውስጥ ትገኛለች።
oromo: Yukireeniin duula diroonii 'Molochka' jedhamuun, gargaarsa boba'aa fi anniisaa Ruusiyaan gara Kirimiyaatti ergitu guutummaatti addaan kutteetti. Dooniiwwan boba'aa galaana Azoov keessa darban irratti tarkaanfii fudhachuun, daandiiwwan dhiyeessii guddaa waan cufteef, naannichatti hanqinni boba'aa cimaan uumameera. Bulchiitoonni Ruusiyaa boba'aa gahaa ta'e dhiyeessuu akka hin dandeenye waan beeksisaniif, Kirimiyan rakkoo anniisaa hamaa keessa seentee jirti.

title: US marines board commercial tanker in Gulf of Oman
english: United States Marines from the 11th Marine Expeditionary Unit recently boarded a commercial tanker named the M/T Wen Yao in the Gulf of Oman. This operation was carried out as part of an ongoing naval blockade against Iran. The military released footage confirming the boarding took place as part of their maritime enforcement efforts.
amharic: የአሜሪካ የባህር ኃይል ወታደሮች በኦማን ባህረ ሰላጤ ውስጥ በሚገኝ የንግድ መርከብ ላይ ተሳፍረዋል። ይህ ድርጊት የተፈጸመው በኢራን ላይ እየተካሄደ ባለው የባህር ላይ እገዳ አካል ሆኖ ነው። ወታደራዊው ክፍል መርከቡን እንደተቆጣጠሩ የሚያሳይ ምስል ለህዝብ ይፋ አድርገዋል።
oromo: Humnooti loltummaa galaanaatti kan Ameerikaa (US Marines) galaana Omaan keessatti doonii daldalaa 'M/T Wen Yao' jedhamtu tokko to'annoo isaanii jala oolchaniiru. Tarkaanfiin kun qabeenya Iranirratti taasifamaa jiru kan gufachiisu yoo ta'u, kutaan waraanaa kunis suuraa fi viidiyoo ta'e sana akka ragaatti baaseera.

title: China slams Trump’s claims over 2020 US election interference
english: China has officially rejected accusations made by Donald Trump regarding their alleged involvement in the 2020 United States presidential election.
